Meditation App Development Guide

This step-by-step guide will help you start developing your meditation app with Flutter and Supabase. I've broken down the process into granular steps to make it easier to follow.

Phase 1: Development Environment Setup

1. Install Development Tools

  1. Install Flutter SDK:
    • Go to https://flutter.dev/docs/get-started/install
    • Download the Flutter SDK for your operating system
    • Extract the ZIP file to a location on your computer (e.g., C:\src\flutter or ~/flutter)
    • Add Flutter to your PATH
  2. Install VS Code:
    • Go to https://code.visualstudio.com/
    • Download and install VS Code for your OS
    • Open VS Code
  3. Install Flutter and Dart Extensions in VS Code:
    • Click on Extensions icon in the sidebar (or press Ctrl+Shift+X)
    • Search for "Flutter"
    • Install the Flutter extension by Dart Code (this will also install Dart extension)
    • Restart VS Code
  4. Install Git:
    • Go to https://git-scm.com/downloads
    • Download and install Git for your operating system
  5. Verify Flutter Installation:
    • Open a terminal/command prompt
    • Run flutter doctor
    • Follow any recommendations to complete setup

2. Set Up a New Flutter Project

  1. Create a New Project:
    • Open VS Code
    • Press Ctrl+Shift+P to open the command palette
    • Type "Flutter: New Project" and select it
    • Select "Application"
    • Choose a directory to save your project
    • Enter project name: meditation_app
    • Wait for project creation to complete
  2. Clean the Default App:
    • Open lib/main.dart
    • Delete everything after the imports
    • Create a minimal starting point:

dart

void main() {

  runApp(const MeditationApp());

}

 

class MeditationApp extends StatelessWidget {

  const MeditationApp({Key? key}) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context) {

    return MaterialApp(

      title: 'Meditation App',

      theme: ThemeData(

        primarySwatch: Colors.blue,

        visualDensity: VisualDensity.adaptivePlatformDensity,

      ),

      home: const SplashScreen(),

    );

  }

}

 

class SplashScreen extends StatelessWidget {

  const SplashScreen({Key? key}) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context) {

    return Scaffold(

      body: Center(

        child: Text('Meditation App'),

      ),

    );

  }

}

  1. Run the App for First Time:
    • Connect a device or start an emulator
    • Click the Debug icon in VS Code sidebar
    • Click "Run and Debug"
    • Select "Dart & Flutter" if prompted
    • Verify app starts with splash screen

Phase 2: Add Dependencies

1. Add Core Dependencies

  1. Open Terminal in VS Code:
    • Press Ctrl+` to open the terminal
  2. Add Flutter Dependencies:
    • Run the following commands:

bash

flutter pub add supabase_flutter

flutter pub add flutter_riverpod

flutter pub add hooks_riverpod

flutter pub add flutter_hooks

flutter pub add go_router

flutter pub add just_audio

flutter pub add audio_service

flutter pub add freezed_annotation

flutter pub add json_annotation

flutter pub add flutter_svg

flutter pub add intl

flutter pub add share_plus

flutter pub add cached_network_image

flutter pub add flutter_secure_storage

  1. Add Dev Dependencies:
    • Run the following commands:

bash

flutter pub add dev:build_runner

flutter pub add dev:freezed

flutter pub add dev:json_serializable

  1. Create a .env File:
    • In the root of your project, create a new file called .env
    • Add the following placeholders:

SUPABASE_URL=your-supabase-url

SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=your-supabase-anon-key

  1. Add an Environment Loading Package:
    • Run: flutter pub add flutter_dotenv
  2. Update .gitignore:
    • Open .gitignore file
    • Add .env to the file to keep your keys private

Phase 3: Set Up Supabase

1. Create a Supabase Project

  1. Sign Up/Login to Supabase:
    • Go to https://supabase.com/
    • Click "Start your project" or log in
    • Create an organization if you don't have one
  2. Create a New Project:
    • Click "New Project"
    • Enter a name for your project (e.g., "MeditationApp")
    • Set a secure database password
    • Select a region close to your target users
    • Click "Create new project"
    • Wait for project creation (5-10 minutes)
  3. Get Project Credentials:
    • In your project dashboard, click the settings icon (gear) in the sidebar
    • Click "API" in the sidebar menu
    • Copy the URL and anon key
    • Paste these into your .env file created earlier

2. Create Database Schema

  1. Open SQL Editor in Supabase:
    • Click on "SQL Editor" in the Supabase sidebar
    • Click "New Query"
  2. Create Users Table:
    • Paste the users table schema from your PRD
    • Click "Run" to create the table
  3. Create Artists Table:
    • Create a new query
    • Paste the artists table schema
    • Click "Run"
  4. Create Tracks Table:
    • Create a new query
    • Paste the meditation_tracks table schema
    • Click "Run"
  5. Create Sessions Table:
    • Create a new query
    • Paste the meditation_sessions table schema
    • Click "Run"
  6. Create Referrals Tables:
    • Create a new query
    • Paste the user_referrals and artist_earnings table schemas
    • Click "Run"
  7. Set Up Row Level Security:
    • Create a new query with the following SQL:

sql

-- Enable RLS on all tables

ALTER TABLE users ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

ALTER TABLE artists ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

ALTER TABLE meditation_tracks ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

ALTER TABLE meditation_sessions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

ALTER TABLE user_referrals ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

ALTER TABLE artist_earnings ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

 

-- Create policies

-- Users can only access their own data

CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own data" ON users

  FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = id);

 

CREATE POLICY "Users can update their own data" ON users

  FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = id);

 

-- Anyone can view artists

CREATE POLICY "Anyone can view artists" ON artists

  FOR SELECT USING (true);

 

-- Anyone can view tracks

CREATE POLICY "Anyone can view tracks" ON meditation_tracks

  FOR SELECT USING (true);

 

-- Users can only view their own meditation sessions

CREATE POLICY "Users can view their own sessions" ON meditation_sessions

  FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

 

CREATE POLICY "Users can insert their own sessions" ON meditation_sessions

  FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);

Phase 4: Project Structure Setup

1. Create Folder Structure

  1. Create Project Directories:
    • In VS Code, right-click on the lib folder
    • Create the following directory structure:

lib/

├── config/

├── data/

│   ├── models/

│   ├── repositories/

│   └── services/

├── presentation/

│   ├── screens/

│   ├── widgets/

│   └── state/

└── utils/

  1. Create Config Files:
    • Create lib/config/constants.dart:

dart

class AppConstants {

  static const String appName = 'Meditation App';

}

  • Create lib/config/theme.dart:

dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

 

class AppTheme {

  // Define your color scheme

  static final ColorScheme lightColorScheme = ColorScheme.light(

    primary: Colors.indigo,

    secondary: Colors.teal,

    background: Colors.white,

  );

 

  // Define text theme

  static final TextTheme textTheme = TextTheme(

    headlineLarge: TextStyle(

      fontSize: 28,

      fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

    ),

    headlineMedium: TextStyle(

      fontSize: 24,

      fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,

    ),

    bodyLarge: TextStyle(

      fontSize: 16,

    ),

    bodyMedium: TextStyle(

      fontSize: 14,

    ),

  );

 

  // Main theme data

  static ThemeData lightTheme = ThemeData(

    colorScheme: lightColorScheme,

    textTheme: textTheme,

    useMaterial3: true,

  );

}

  1. Update Main.dart to Load Environment Variables:
    • Open lib/main.dart
    • Update with the following:

dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:flutter_dotenv/flutter_dotenv.dart';

import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/config/theme.dart';

 

Future<void> main() async {

  WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized();

 

  // Load environment variables

  await dotenv.load();

 

  runApp(

    // Wrap with ProviderScope for Riverpod

    ProviderScope(

      child: MeditationApp(),

    ),

  );

}

 

class MeditationApp extends StatelessWidget {

  const MeditationApp({Key? key}) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context) {

    return MaterialApp(

      title: 'Meditation App',

      theme: AppTheme.lightTheme,

      home: const SplashScreen(),

    );

  }

}

 

class SplashScreen extends StatelessWidget {

  const SplashScreen({Key? key}) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context) {

    return Scaffold(

      body: Center(

        child: Column(

          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,

          children: [

            Text(

              'Meditation App',

              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineLarge,

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 20),

            CircularProgressIndicator(),

          ],

        ),

      ),

    );

  }

}

Phase 5: Implement Core Services

1. Set Up Supabase Service

  1. Create Supabase Service:
    • Create lib/data/services/supabase_service.dart

dart

import 'package:flutter_dotenv/flutter_dotenv.dart';

import 'package:supabase_flutter/supabase_flutter.dart';

 

class SupabaseService {

  static final SupabaseService _instance = SupabaseService._internal();

  late final SupabaseClient _client;

 

  // Singleton pattern

  factory SupabaseService() {

    return _instance;

  }

 

  SupabaseService._internal();

 

  Future<void> initialize() async {

    await Supabase.initialize(

      url: dotenv.env['SUPABASE_URL']!,

      anonKey: dotenv.env['SUPABASE_ANON_KEY']!,

    );

   

    _client = Supabase.instance.client;

  }

 

  SupabaseClient get client => _client;

 

  // Auth methods

  Future<AuthResponse> signUp({

    required String email,

    required String password,

    String? referralCode,

  }) async {

    return await _client.auth.signUp(

      email: email,

      password: password,

      data: referralCode != null ? {'referral_code': referralCode} : null,

    );

  }

 

  Future<AuthResponse> signIn({

    required String email,

    required String password,

  }) async {

    return await _client.auth.signInWithPassword(

      email: email,

      password: password,

    );

  }

 

  Future<void> signOut() async {

    await _client.auth.signOut();

  }

 

  // User session

  User? get currentUser => _client.auth.currentUser;

  bool get isAuthenticated => _client.auth.currentUser != null;

  Stream<AuthState> get authStateChanges => _client.auth.onAuthStateChange;

}

  1. Initialize Supabase in Main:
    • Update lib/main.dart to initialize Supabase:

dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:flutter_dotenv/flutter_dotenv.dart';

import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/config/theme.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/services/supabase_service.dart';

 

Future<void> main() async {

  WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized();

 

  // Load environment variables

  await dotenv.load();

 

  // Initialize Supabase

  await SupabaseService().initialize();

 

  runApp(

    ProviderScope(

      child: MeditationApp(),

    ),

  );

}

 

// Rest of the code remains the same

2. Create Data Models

  1. Create User Model:
    • Create lib/data/models/user_model.dart

dart

import 'package:freezed_annotation/freezed_annotation.dart';

import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';

 

part 'user_model.freezed.dart';

part 'user_model.g.dart';

 

@freezed

class UserModel with _$UserModel {

  const factory UserModel({

    required String id,

    required String email,

    String? displayName,

    String? avatarUrl,

    @Default(true) bool notificationEnabled,

    @Default(0) int totalMeditationMinutes,

    @Default(0) int longestStreak,

    @Default(0) int currentStreak,

    DateTime? lastMeditationDate,

    String? referringArtistId,

    @Default(false) bool discountApplied,

    DateTime? discountExpiryDate,

  }) = _UserModel;

 

  factory UserModel.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) => _$UserModelFromJson(json);

}

  1. Create Artist Model:
    • Create lib/data/models/artist_model.dart

dart

import 'package:freezed_annotation/freezed_annotation.dart';

import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';

 

part 'artist_model.freezed.dart';

part 'artist_model.g.dart';

 

@freezed

class ArtistModel with _$ArtistModel {

  const factory ArtistModel({

    required String id,

    required String name,

    required String bio,

    required String shortBio,

    required String imageUrl,

    @Default(false) bool featured,

    @Default(50) int revenueSharePercentage,

    required String referralCode,

  }) = _ArtistModel;

 

  factory ArtistModel.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) => _$ArtistModelFromJson(json);

}

  1. Create Track Model:
    • Create lib/data/models/track_model.dart

dart

import 'package:freezed_annotation/freezed_annotation.dart';

import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';

 

part 'track_model.freezed.dart';

part 'track_model.g.dart';

 

@freezed

class TrackModel with _$TrackModel {

  const factory TrackModel({

    required String id,

    required String title,

    required String artistId,

    required String audioUrl,

    required int duration,

    @Default(false) bool isGuided,

  }) = _TrackModel;

 

  factory TrackModel.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) => _$TrackModelFromJson(json);

}

  1. Create Session Model:
    • Create lib/data/models/session_model.dart

dart

import 'package:freezed_annotation/freezed_annotation.dart';

import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';

 

part 'session_model.freezed.dart';

part 'session_model.g.dart';

 

@freezed

class SessionModel with _$SessionModel {

  const factory SessionModel({

    required String id,

    required String userId,

    required String trackId,

    required int duration,

    @Default(true) bool completed,

    required DateTime completedAt,

    required DateTime date,

  }) = _SessionModel;

 

  factory SessionModel.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) => _$SessionModelFromJson(json);

}

  1. Generate Freezed Models:
    • In the terminal, run:

bash

flutter pub run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs

    • This will generate all the required freezed and json serialization files

Phase 6: Authentication Implementation

1. Create Auth Repository

  1. Create Auth Repository Interface:
    • Create lib/data/repositories/auth_repository.dart

dart

import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/user_model.dart';

 

abstract class AuthRepository {

  Future<UserModel?> signUp({

    required String email,

    required String password,

    String? referralCode,

  });

 

  Future<UserModel?> signIn({

    required String email,

    required String password,

  });

 

  Future<void> signOut();

 

  bool get isAuthenticated;

  UserModel? get currentUser;

  Stream<UserModel?> get authStateChanges;

}

  1. Create Supabase Auth Repository Implementation:
    • Create lib/data/repositories/supabase_auth_repository.dart

dart

import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/user_model.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/auth_repository.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/services/supabase_service.dart';

import 'package:supabase_flutter/supabase_flutter.dart';

 

class SupabaseAuthRepository implements AuthRepository {

  final SupabaseService _supabaseService = SupabaseService();

  UserModel? _cachedUser;

 

  @override

  Future<UserModel?> signUp({

    required String email,

    required String password,

    String? referralCode,

  }) async {

    try {

      final response = await _supabaseService.signUp(

        email: email,

        password: password,

        referralCode: referralCode,

      );

     

      if (response.user != null) {

        // Create user profile

        await _supabaseService.client.from('users').insert({

          'id': response.user!.id,

          'email': email,

          'referring_artist_id': null, // Will be updated after verification

          'discount_applied': referralCode != null,

          'discount_expiry_date': referralCode != null

            ? DateTime.now().add(Duration(days: 30)).toIso8601String()

            : null,

        });

       

        // Process referral if provided

        if (referralCode != null) {

          _processReferral(response.user!.id, referralCode);

        }

       

        return await _fetchUserProfile(response.user!.id);

      }

      return null;

    } catch (e) {

      print('Error during sign up: $e');

      return null;

    }

  }

 

  @override

  Future<UserModel?> signIn({

    required String email,

    required String password,

  }) async {

    try {

      final response = await _supabaseService.signIn(

        email: email,

        password: password,

      );

     

      if (response.user != null) {

        return await _fetchUserProfile(response.user!.id);

      }

      return null;

    } catch (e) {

      print('Error during sign in: $e');

      return null;

    }

  }

 

  @override

  Future<void> signOut() async {

    await _supabaseService.signOut();

    _cachedUser = null;

  }

 

  @override

  bool get isAuthenticated => _supabaseService.isAuthenticated;

 

  @override

  UserModel? get currentUser => _cachedUser;

 

  @override

  Stream<UserModel?> get authStateChanges =>

    _supabaseService.authStateChanges.asyncMap((authState) async {

      if (authState.event == AuthChangeEvent.signedIn && authState.session != null) {

        _cachedUser = await _fetchUserProfile(authState.session!.user.id);

        return _cachedUser;

      } else if (authState.event == AuthChangeEvent.signedOut) {

        _cachedUser = null;

        return null;

      }

      return _cachedUser;

    });

 

  Future<UserModel?> _fetchUserProfile(String userId) async {

    try {

      final response = await _supabaseService.client

          .from('users')

          .select()

          .eq('id', userId)

          .single();

         

      if (response != null) {

        _cachedUser = UserModel.fromJson(response);

        return _cachedUser;

      }

      return null;

    } catch (e) {

      print('Error fetching user profile: $e');

      return null;

    }

  }

 

  Future<void> _processReferral(String userId, String referralCode) async {

    try {

      // Find artist by referral code

      final artistResponse = await _supabaseService.client

          .from('artists')

          .select()

          .eq('referral_code', referralCode)

          .single();

         

      if (artistResponse != null) {

        String artistId = artistResponse['id'];

       

        // Update user with referring artist

        await _supabaseService.client

            .from('users')

            .update({'referring_artist_id': artistId})

            .eq('id', userId);

           

        // Create referral record

        await _supabaseService.client

            .from('user_referrals')

            .insert({

              'user_id': userId,

              'artist_id': artistId,

              'discount_applied': true,

            });

      }

    } catch (e) {

      print('Error processing referral: $e');

    }

  }

}

2. Create Auth State Provider

  1. Create Auth State Provider:
    • Create lib/presentation/state/auth_provider.dart

dart

import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/user_model.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/auth_repository.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/supabase_auth_repository.dart';

 

// Repository provider

final authRepositoryProvider = Provider<AuthRepository>((ref) {

  return SupabaseAuthRepository();

});

 

// Auth state provider

final authStateProvider = StreamProvider<UserModel?>((ref) {

  final authRepository = ref.watch(authRepositoryProvider);

  return authRepository.authStateChanges;

});

 

// Current user provider

final currentUserProvider = Provider<UserModel?>((ref) {

  final authState = ref.watch(authStateProvider);

  return authState.when(

    data: (user) => user,

    loading: () => null,

    error: (_, __) => null,

  );

});

 

// Is authenticated provider

final isAuthenticatedProvider = Provider<bool>((ref) {

  final user = ref.watch(currentUserProvider);

  return user != null;

});

Phase 7: Setup Authentication UI

1. Create Login and Signup Screens

  1. Create Login Screen:
    • Create lib/presentation/screens/auth/login_screen.dart

dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:flutter_hooks/flutter_hooks.dart';

import 'package:hooks_riverpod/hooks_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/auth_provider.dart';

 

class LoginScreen extends HookConsumerWidget {

  const LoginScreen({Key? key}) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {

    final emailController = useTextEditingController();

    final passwordController = useTextEditingController();

    final isLoading = useState(false);

    final errorMessage = useState<String?>(null);

 

    void login() async {

      if (emailController.text.isEmpty || passwordController.text.isEmpty) {

        errorMessage.value = 'Please fill all fields';

        return;

      }

 

      isLoading.value = true;

      errorMessage.value = null;

 

      try {

        final authRepository = ref.read(authRepositoryProvider);

        final user = await authRepository.signIn(

          email: emailController.text.trim(),

          password: passwordController.text,

        );

 

        if (user == null) {

          errorMessage.value = 'Invalid email or password';

        }

      } catch (e) {

        errorMessage.value = 'Something went wrong. Please try again.';

        print(e);

      } finally {

        isLoading.value = false;

      }

    }

 

    return Scaffold(

      appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Login')),

      body: Padding(

        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20.0),

        child: Column(

          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,

          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,

          children: [

            Text(

              'Welcome Back',

              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,

              textAlign: TextAlign.center,

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 40),

            TextField(

              controller: emailController,

              decoration: InputDecoration(

                labelText: 'Email',

                border: OutlineInputBorder(),

              ),

              keyboardType: TextInputType.emailAddress,

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 16),

            TextField(

              controller: passwordController,

              decoration: InputDecoration(

                labelText: 'Password',

                border: OutlineInputBorder(),

              ),

              obscureText: true,

            ),

            if (errorMessage.value != null) ...[

              SizedBox(height: 16),

              Text(

                errorMessage.value!,

                style: TextStyle(color: Colors.red),

                textAlign: TextAlign.center,

              ),

            ],

            SizedBox(height: 24),

            ElevatedButton(

              onPressed: isLoading.value ? null : login,

              child: isLoading.value

                  ? CircularProgressIndicator()

                  : Text('Login'),

              style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(

                padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),

              ),

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 16),

            TextButton(

              onPressed: () {

                Navigator.pushNamed(context, '/auth/signup');

              },

              child: Text('Don\'t have an account? Sign up'),

            ),

          ],

        ),

      ),

    );

  }

}

  1. Create Signup Screen:
    • Create lib/presentation/screens/auth/signup_screen.dart

dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:flutter_hooks/flutter_hooks.dart';

import 'package:hooks_riverpod/hooks_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/auth_provider.dart';

 

class SignupScreen extends HookConsumerWidget {

  const SignupScreen({Key? key}) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {

    final emailController = useTextEditingController();

    final passwordController = useTextEditingController();

    final referralCodeController = useTextEditingController();

    final isLoading = useState(false);

    final errorMessage = useState<String?>(null);

 

    void signup() async {

      if (emailController.text.isEmpty || passwordController.text.isEmpty) {

        errorMessage.value = 'Please fill all required fields';

        return;

      }

 

      isLoading.value = true;

      errorMessage.value = null;

 

      try {

        final authRepository = ref.read(authRepositoryProvider);

       

        String? referralCode =

          referralCodeController.text.isEmpty ? null : referralCodeController.text.trim();

         

        final user = await authRepository.signUp(

          email: emailController.text.trim(),

          password: passwordController.text,

          referralCode: referralCode,

        );

 

        if (user == null) {

          errorMessage.value = 'Could not create account. Please try again.';

        }

      } catch (e) {

        errorMessage.value = 'Something went wrong. Please try again.';

        print(e);

      } finally {

        isLoading.value = false;

      }

    }

 

    return Scaffold(

      appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Sign Up')),

      body: Padding(

        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20.0),

        child: Column(

          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,

          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,

          children: [

            Text(

              'Create Account',

              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,

              textAlign: TextAlign.center,

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 40),

            TextField(

              controller: emailController,

              decoration: InputDecoration(

                labelText: 'Email *',

                border: OutlineInputBorder(),

              ),

              keyboardType: TextInputType.emailAddress,

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 16),

            TextField(

              controller: passwordController,

              decoration: InputDecoration(

                labelText: 'Password *',

                border: OutlineInputBorder(),

              ),

              obscureText: true,

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 16),

            TextField(

              controller: referralCodeController,

              decoration: InputDecoration(

                labelText: 'Artist Referral Code (Optional)',

                border: OutlineInputBorder(),

                hintText: 'Enter code for 30% off first month',

              ),

            ),

            if (errorMessage.value != null) ...[

              SizedBox(height: 16),

              Text(

                errorMessage.value!,

                style: TextStyle(color: Colors.red),

                textAlign: TextAlign.center,

              ),

            ],

            SizedBox(height: 24),

            ElevatedButton(

              onPressed: isLoading.value ? null : signup,

              child: isLoading.value

                  ? CircularProgressIndicator()

                  : Text('Sign Up'),

              style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(

                padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),

              ),

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 16),

            TextButton(

              onPressed: () {

                Navigator.pushNamed(context, '/auth/login');

              },

              child: Text('Already have an account? Login'),

            ),

          ],

        ),

      ),

    );

  }

}

Phase 8: Set Up Routing with Go Router

  1. Create Router Configuration:
    • Create lib/config/router.dart

dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';

import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/screens/auth/login_screen.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/screens/auth/signup_screen.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/screens/splash_screen.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/auth_provider.dart';

 

final routerProvider = Provider<GoRouter>((ref) {

  final isAuthenticated = ref.watch(isAuthenticatedProvider);

 

  return GoRouter(

    initialLocation: '/',

    redirect: (context, state) {

      // If the user is not authenticated, they can only access auth routes

      if (!isAuthenticated && !state.location.startsWith('/auth')) {

        return '/auth/login';

      }

     

      // If the user is authenticated, redirect from auth routes to home

      if (isAuthenticated && state.location.startsWith('/auth')) {

        return '/home';

      }

     

      return null;

    },

    routes: [

      // Initial splash screen

      GoRoute(

        path: '/',

        builder: (context, state) => SplashScreen(),

      ),

     

      // Auth routes

      GoRoute(

        path: '/auth/login',

        builder: (context, state) => LoginScreen(),

      ),

      GoRoute(

        path: '/auth/signup',

        builder: (context, state) => SignupScreen(),

      ),

     

      // Home (will add more routes later)

      GoRoute(

        path: '/home',

        builder: (context, state) => Scaffold(

          body: Center(child: Text('Home Screen - To be implemented')),

        ),

      ),

    ],

    errorBuilder: (context, state) => Scaffold(

      body: Center(

        child: Text('Page not found: ${state.location}'),

      ),

    ),

  );

});

  1. Create Splash Screen:
    • Create lib/presentation/screens/splash_screen.dart

dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/auth_provider.dart';

 

class SplashScreen extends ConsumerStatefulWidget {

  const SplashScreen({Key? key}) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  ConsumerState<SplashScreen> createState() => _SplashScreenState();

}

 

class _SplashScreenState extends ConsumerState<SplashScreen> {

  @override

  void initState() {

    super.initState();

    _checkAuthentication();

  }

 

  Future<void> _checkAuthentication() async {

    // Delay for a minimum splash screen display time

    await Future.delayed(Duration(seconds: 2));

   

    // Let the router handle the redirect based on auth state

    if (mounted) {

      context.go('/home');

    }

  }

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context) {

    return Scaffold(

      body: Center(

        child: Column(

          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,

          children: [

            Text(

              'Meditation App',

              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineLarge,

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 20),

            CircularProgressIndicator(),

          ],

        ),

      ),

    );

  }

}

  1. Update Main to Use Router:
    • Update lib/main.dart

dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:flutter_dotenv/flutter_dotenv.dart';

import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/config/router.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/services/supabase_service.dart';

 

Future<void> main() async {

  WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized();

 

  // Load environment variables

  await dotenv.load();

 

  // Initialize Supabase

  await SupabaseService().initialize();

 

  runApp(

    ProviderScope(

      child: MeditationApp(),

    ),

  );

}

 

class MeditationApp extends ConsumerWidget {

  const MeditationApp({Key? key}) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {

    final router = ref.watch(routerProvider);

   

    return MaterialApp.router(

      title: 'Meditation App',

      theme: ThemeData(

        primarySwatch: Colors.blue,

        visualDensity: VisualDensity.adaptivePlatformDensity,

        useMaterial3: true,

      ),

      routerDelegate: router.routerDelegate,

      routeInformationParser: router.routeInformationParser,

      routeInformationProvider: router.routeInformationProvider,

    );

  }

}

Phase 9: Artist Repository and Home Tab

  1. Create Artist Repository:
    • Create lib/data/repositories/artist_repository.dart

dart

import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/artist_model.dart';

 

abstract class ArtistRepository {

  Future<List<ArtistModel>> getArtists();

  Future<ArtistModel?> getArtistById(String id);

  Future<ArtistModel?> getArtistByReferralCode(String code);

  Future<List<ArtistModel>> searchArtists(String query);

}

  1. Create Supabase Implementation:
    • Create lib/data/repositories/supabase_artist_repository.dart

dart

import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/artist_model.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/artist_repository.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/services/supabase_service.dart';

 

class SupabaseArtistRepository implements ArtistRepository {

  final SupabaseService _supabaseService = SupabaseService();

 

  @override

  Future<List<ArtistModel>> getArtists() async {

    try {

      final response = await _supabaseService.client

          .from('artists')

          .select()

          .order('name');

         

      return (response as List)

          .map((json) => ArtistModel.fromJson(json))

          .toList();

    } catch (e) {

      print('Error getting artists: $e');

      return [];

    }

  }

 

  @override

  Future<ArtistModel?> getArtistById(String id) async {

    try {

      final response = await _supabaseService.client

          .from('artists')

          .select()

          .eq('id', id)

          .single();

         

      if (response != null) {

        return ArtistModel.fromJson(response);

      }

      return null;

    } catch (e) {

      print('Error getting artist by id: $e');

      return null;

    }

  }

 

  @override

  Future<ArtistModel?> getArtistByReferralCode(String code) async {

    try {

      final response = await _supabaseService.client

          .from('artists')

          .select()

          .eq('referral_code', code)

          .single();

         

      if (response != null) {

        return ArtistModel.fromJson(response);

      }

      return null;

    } catch (e) {

      print('Error getting artist by referral code: $e');

      return null;

    }

  }

 

  @override

  Future<List<ArtistModel>> searchArtists(String query) async {

    try {

      final response = await _supabaseService.client

          .from('artists')

          .select()

          .ilike('name', '%$query%')

          .order('name');

         

      return (response as List)

          .map((json) => ArtistModel.fromJson(json))

          .toList();

    } catch (e) {

      print('Error searching artists: $e');

      return [];

    }

  }

}

  1. Create Artist Provider:
    • Create lib/presentation/state/artist_provider.dart

dart

import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/artist_model.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/artist_repository.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/supabase_artist_repository.dart';

 

// Repository provider

final artistRepositoryProvider = Provider<ArtistRepository>((ref) {

  return SupabaseArtistRepository();

});

 

// All artists provider

final artistsProvider = FutureProvider<List<ArtistModel>>((ref) async {

  final repository = ref.watch(artistRepositoryProvider);

  return repository.getArtists();

});

 

// Artist by ID provider

final artistByIdProvider = FutureProvider.family<ArtistModel?, String>((ref, id) async {

  final repository = ref.watch(artistRepositoryProvider);

  return repository.getArtistById(id);

});

 

// Artist search provider

final artistSearchProvider = StateProvider<String>((ref) => '');

 

// Filtered artists provider

final filteredArtistsProvider = FutureProvider<List<ArtistModel>>((ref) async {

  final artists = await ref.watch(artistsProvider.future);

  final searchQuery = ref.watch(artistSearchProvider);

 

  if (searchQuery.isEmpty) {

    return artists;

  }

 

  return artists.where((artist) =>

    artist.name.toLowerCase().contains(searchQuery.toLowerCase())

  ).toList();

});

Phase 10: Home Screen & Artist List

  1. Create Artist Card Widget:
    • Create lib/presentation/widgets/artist_card.dart

dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/artist_model.dart';

import 'package:cached_network_image/cached_network_image.dart';

 

class ArtistCard extends StatelessWidget {

  final ArtistModel artist;

  final VoidCallback onTap;

 

  const ArtistCard({

    Key? key,

    required this.artist,

    required this.onTap,

  }) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context) {

    return GestureDetector(

      onTap: onTap,

      child: Card(

        elevation: 2,

        shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(

          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),

        ),

        child: Column(

          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

          children: [

            ClipRRect(

              borderRadius: BorderRadius.vertical(top: Radius.circular(12)),

              child: CachedNetworkImage(

                imageUrl: artist.imageUrl,

                height: 120,

                width: double.infinity,

                fit: BoxFit.cover,

                placeholder: (context, url) => Center(

                  child: CircularProgressIndicator(),

                ),

                errorWidget: (context, url, error) => Center(

                  child: Icon(Icons.error),

                ),

              ),

            ),

            Padding(

              padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),

              child: Column(

                crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

                children: [

                  Text(

                    artist.name,

                    style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium?.copyWith(

                      fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

                    ),

                    maxLines: 1,

                    overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,

                  ),

                  SizedBox(height: 4),

                  Text(

                    artist.shortBio,

                    style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.bodySmall,

                    maxLines: 2,

                    overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,

                  ),

                ],

              ),

            ),

          ],

        ),

      ),

    );

  }

}

  1. Create Home Screen with Search:
    • Create lib/presentation/screens/home_screen.dart

dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:flutter_hooks/flutter_hooks.dart';

import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';

import 'package:hooks_riverpod/hooks_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/artist_model.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/artist_provider.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/widgets/artist_card.dart';

 

class HomeScreen extends HookConsumerWidget {

  const HomeScreen({Key? key}) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {

    final searchController = useTextEditingController();

    final searchQuery = ref.watch(artistSearchProvider);

    final filteredArtists = ref.watch(filteredArtistsProvider);

   

    useEffect(() {

      return () {

        // Clean up search when disposing

        ref.read(artistSearchProvider.notifier).state = '';

      };

    }, []);

   

    return Scaffold(

      body: SafeArea(

        child: Column(

          children: [

            // Search bar

            Padding(

              padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16.0),

              child: TextField(

                controller: searchController,

                decoration: InputDecoration(

                  hintText: 'Search artists...',

                  prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.search),

                  border: OutlineInputBorder(

                    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(30),

                  ),

                ),

                onChanged: (value) {

                  ref.read(artistSearchProvider.notifier).state = value;

                },

              ),

            ),

           

            // Artists grid

            Expanded(

              child: filteredArtists.when(

                data: (artists) {

                  if (artists.isEmpty) {

                    if (searchQuery.isNotEmpty) {

                      return Center(

                        child: Text('No artists found matching "$searchQuery"'),

                      );

                    }

                    return Center(

                      child: Text('No artists available'),

                    );

                  }

                 

                  return GridView.builder(

                    padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

                    gridDelegate: SliverGridDelegateWithFixedCrossAxisCount(

                      crossAxisCount: 2,

                      crossAxisSpacing: 16,

                      mainAxisSpacing: 16,

                      childAspectRatio: 0.75,

                    ),

                    itemCount: artists.length,

                    itemBuilder: (context, index) {

                      final artist = artists[index];

                      return ArtistCard(

                        artist: artist,

                        onTap: () {

                          context.push('/artists/${artist.id}');

                        },

                      );

                    },

                  );

                },

                loading: () => Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),

                error: (error, stackTrace) => Center(

                  child: Text('Error loading artists: $error'),

                ),

              ),

            ),

          ],

        ),

      ),

    );

  }

}

 

Phase 11: Create Bottom Navigation

1.     Create Main Layout with Tabs:

o   Create lib/presentation/screens/main_layout.dart

dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/screens/calendar_screen.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/screens/home_screen.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/screens/settings_screen.dart';
 
class MainLayout extends StatefulWidget {
  final int initialIndex;
  const MainLayout({Key? key, this.initialIndex = 0}) : super(key: key);
 
  @override
  State<MainLayout> createState() => _MainLayoutState();
}
 
class _MainLayoutState extends State<MainLayout> {
  late int _currentIndex;
  
  @override
  void initState() {
    super.initState();
    _currentIndex = widget.initialIndex;
  }
  
  final List<Widget> _screens = [
    HomeScreen(),
    CalendarScreen(), 
    SettingsScreen(), 
  ];
  
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      body: _screens[_currentIndex],
      bottomNavigationBar: BottomNavigationBar(
        currentIndex: _currentIndex,
        onTap: (index) {
          setState(() {
            _currentIndex = index;
          });
        },
        items: [
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(Icons.home),
            label: 'Home',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(Icons.calendar_today),
            label: 'Calendar',
          ),
          BottomNavigationBarItem(
            icon: Icon(Icons.settings),
            label: 'Settings',
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

2.     Create Calendar Screen Placeholder:

o   Create lib/presentation/screens/calendar_screen.dart

dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
 
class CalendarScreen extends StatelessWidget {
  const CalendarScreen({Key? key}) : super(key: key);
 
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text('Your Meditation Calendar'),
      ),
      body: Center(
        child: Text('Calendar visualization coming soon'),
      ),
    );
  }
}

3.     Create Settings Screen Placeholder:

o   Create lib/presentation/screens/settings_screen.dart

dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/auth_provider.dart';
 
class SettingsScreen extends ConsumerWidget {
  const SettingsScreen({Key? key}) : super(key: key);
 
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final user = ref.watch(currentUserProvider);
    
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text('Settings'),
      ),
      body: ListView(
        children: [
          ListTile(
            title: Text('Email'),
            subtitle: Text(user?.email ?? ''),
          ),
          Divider(),
          ListTile(
            title: Text('Log Out'),
            leading: Icon(Icons.logout),
            onTap: () async {
              final authRepository = ref.read(authRepositoryProvider);
              await authRepository.signOut();
            },
          ),
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

4.     Update Router to Use Main Layout:

o   Update lib/config/router.dart

dart
// Add this import
import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/screens/main_layout.dart';
 
// Then update the home route:
GoRoute(
  path: '/home',
  builder: (context, state) => MainLayout(initialIndex: 0),
),
GoRoute(
  path: '/calendar',
  builder: (context, state) => MainLayout(initialIndex: 1),
),
GoRoute(
  path: '/settings',
  builder: (context, state) => MainLayout(initialIndex: 2),
),

Phase 12: Artist Detail Screen

1.     Create Track Model and Repository:

o   Create lib/data/repositories/track_repository.dart

dart
import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/track_model.dart';
 
abstract class TrackRepository {
  Future<List<TrackModel>> getTracksByArtist(String artistId);
  Future<TrackModel?> getTrackById(String id);
}

2.     Create Supabase Track Repository Implementation:

o   Create lib/data/repositories/supabase_track_repository.dart

dart
import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/track_model.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/track_repository.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/data/services/supabase_service.dart';
 
class SupabaseTrackRepository implements TrackRepository {
  final SupabaseService _supabaseService = SupabaseService();
  
  @override
  Future<List<TrackModel>> getTracksByArtist(String artistId) async {
    try {
      final response = await _supabaseService.client
          .from('meditation_tracks')
          .select()
          .eq('artist_id', artistId)
          .order('title');
          
      return (response as List)
          .map((json) => TrackModel.fromJson(json))
          .toList();
    } catch (e) {
      print('Error getting tracks by artist: $e');
      return [];
    }
  }
  
  @override
  Future<TrackModel?> getTrackById(String id) async {
    try {
      final response = await _supabaseService.client
          .from('meditation_tracks')
          .select()
          .eq('id', id)
          .single();
          
      if (response != null) {
        return TrackModel.fromJson(response);
      }
      return null;
    } catch (e) {
      print('Error getting track by id: $e');
      return null;
    }
  }
}

3.     Create Track Provider:

o   Create lib/presentation/state/track_provider.dart

dart
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/track_model.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/track_repository.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/supabase_track_repository.dart';
 
// Repository provider
final trackRepositoryProvider = Provider<TrackRepository>((ref) {
  return SupabaseTrackRepository();
});
 
// Tracks by artist provider
final tracksByArtistProvider = FutureProvider.family<List<TrackModel>, String>((ref, artistId) async {
  final repository = ref.watch(trackRepositoryProvider);
  return repository.getTracksByArtist(artistId);
});
 
// Track by ID provider
final trackByIdProvider = FutureProvider.family<TrackModel?, String>((ref, id) async {
  final repository = ref.watch(trackRepositoryProvider);
  return repository.getTrackById(id);
});

4.     Create Artist Detail Screen:

o   Create lib/presentation/screens/artist_detail_screen.dart

dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:cached_network_image/cached_network_image.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import 'package:hooks_riverpod/hooks_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/artist_model.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/track_model.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/artist_provider.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/track_provider.dart';
 
class ArtistDetailScreen extends ConsumerWidget {
  final String artistId;
  
  const ArtistDetailScreen({
    Key? key,
    required this.artistId,
  }) : super(key: key);
 
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final artistAsyncValue = ref.watch(artistByIdProvider(artistId));
    final tracksAsyncValue = ref.watch(tracksByArtistProvider(artistId));
    
    return Scaffold(
      body: artistAsyncValue.when(
        data: (artist) {
          if (artist == null) {
            return Center(child: Text('Artist not found'));
          }
          
          return CustomScrollView(
            slivers: [
              // Artist header with image
              SliverAppBar(
                expandedHeight: 200,
                pinned: true,
                flexibleSpace: FlexibleSpaceBar(
                  title: Text(artist.name),
                  background: CachedNetworkImage(
                    imageUrl: artist.imageUrl,
                    fit: BoxFit.cover,
                    placeholder: (context, url) => Center(
                      child: CircularProgressIndicator(),
                    ),
                    errorWidget: (context, url, error) => Center(
                      child: Icon(Icons.error),
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
              ),
              
              // Artist bio
              SliverToBoxAdapter(
                child: Padding(
                  padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16.0),
                  child: Column(
                    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                    children: [
                      Text(
                        'About',
                        style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineSmall,
                      ),
                      SizedBox(height: 8),
                      Text(artist.bio),
                      SizedBox(height: 24),
                      Text(
                        'Meditation Sets',
                        style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineSmall,
                      ),
                      SizedBox(height: 8),
                    ],
                  ),
                ),
              ),
              
              // Tracks list
              _buildTracksList(context, ref, tracksAsyncValue),
            ],
          );
        },
        loading: () => Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),
        error: (error, stackTrace) => Center(
          child: Text('Error loading artist: $error'),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
  
  Widget _buildTracksList(
    BuildContext context,
    WidgetRef ref,
    AsyncValue<List<TrackModel>> tracksAsyncValue,
  ) {
    return tracksAsyncValue.when(
      data: (tracks) {
        if (tracks.isEmpty) {
          return SliverToBoxAdapter(
            child: Center(
              child: Padding(
                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24.0),
                child: Text('No meditation sets available'),
              ),
            ),
          );
        }
        
        return SliverList(
          delegate: SliverChildBuilderDelegate(
            (context, index) {
              final track = tracks[index];
              return ListTile(
                title: Text(track.title),
                subtitle: Text(
                  '${_formatDuration(track.duration)} • ${track.isGuided ? 'Guided' : 'Music only'}',
                ),
                trailing: Icon(Icons.play_circle_fill, size: 40),
                onTap: () {
                  context.push('/meditation/setup/${track.id}');
                },
              );
            },
            childCount: tracks.length,
          ),
        );
      },
      loading: () => SliverToBoxAdapter(
        child: Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),
      ),
      error: (error, stackTrace) => SliverToBoxAdapter(
        child: Center(
          child: Text('Error loading tracks: $error'),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
  
  String _formatDuration(int seconds) {
    final minutes = seconds ~/ 60;
    if (minutes < 60) {
      return '$minutes min';
    }
    final hours = minutes ~/ 60;
    final remainingMinutes = minutes % 60;
    return '$hours h ${remainingMinutes > 0 ? '$remainingMinutes min' : ''}';
  }
}

5.     Update Router for Artist Detail:

o   Update lib/config/router.dart to add:

dart
GoRoute(
  path: '/artists/:id',
  builder: (context, state) => ArtistDetailScreen(
    artistId: state.params['id']!,
  ),
),

Phase 13: Meditation Session Setup

1.     Create Meditation Setup Screen:

o   Create lib/presentation/screens/meditation/session_setup_screen.dart

dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_hooks/flutter_hooks.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import 'package:hooks_riverpod/hooks_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/track_model.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/track_provider.dart';
 
class SessionSetupScreen extends HookConsumerWidget {
  final String trackId;
  
  const SessionSetupScreen({
    Key? key,
    required this.trackId,
  }) : super(key: key);
 
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final trackAsyncValue = ref.watch(trackByIdProvider(trackId));
    final isGuided = useState(true);
    
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: Text('Setup Meditation'),
      ),
      body: trackAsyncValue.when(
        data: (track) {
          if (track == null) {
            return Center(child: Text('Track not found'));
          }
          
          return Padding(
            padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20.0),
            child: Column(
              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
              children: [
                Text(
                  track.title,
                  style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,
                  textAlign: TextAlign.center,
                ),
                SizedBox(height: 40),
                
                // Show track duration
                _buildInfoCard(
                  context,
                  'Duration',
                  _formatDuration(track.duration),
                  Icons.timer,
                ),
                
                SizedBox(height: 24),
                
                // Toggle for guided or music only
                Card(
                  elevation: 2,
                  child: Padding(
                    padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
                    child: Column(
                      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                      children: [
                        Text(
                          'Experience Type',
                          style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,
                        ),
                        SizedBox(height: 16),
                        Row(
                          children: [
                            Expanded(
                              child: _buildExperienceOption(
                                context,
                                'Guided',
                                'Voice guidance with music',
                                Icons.record_voice_over,
                                isGuided.value == true,
                                () => isGuided.value = true,
                              ),
                            ),
                            SizedBox(width: 12),
                            Expanded(
                              child: _buildExperienceOption(
                                context,
                                'Music Only',
                                'No voice guidance',
                                Icons.music_note,
                                isGuided.value == false,
                                () => isGuided.value = false,
                              ),
                            ),
                          ],
                        ),
                      ],
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
                
                Spacer(),
                
                // Start button
                ElevatedButton(
                  onPressed: () {
                    context.push('/meditation/player/$trackId?guided=${isGuided.value}');
                  },
                  child: Padding(
                    padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),
                    child: Text(
                      'Begin Meditation',
                      style: TextStyle(fontSize: 18),
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
              ],
            ),
          );
        },
        loading: () => Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),
        error: (error, stackTrace) => Center(
          child: Text('Error loading track: $error'),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
  
  Widget _buildInfoCard(
    BuildContext context,
    String title,
    String value,
    IconData icon,
  ) {
    return Card(
      elevation: 2,
      child: Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
        child: Row(
          children: [
            Icon(icon, size: 30),
            SizedBox(width: 16),
            Column(
              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
              children: [
                Text(
                  title,
                  style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,
                ),
                Text(
                  value,
                  style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleLarge?.copyWith(
                    fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                  ),
                ),
              ],
            ),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
  
  Widget _buildExperienceOption(
    BuildContext context,
    String title,
    String description,
    IconData icon,
    bool isSelected,
    VoidCallback onTap,
  ) {
    return GestureDetector(
      onTap: onTap,
      child: Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: isSelected
              ? Theme.of(context).primaryColor.withOpacity(0.1)
              : Colors.grey.withOpacity(0.05),
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
          border: Border.all(
            color: isSelected
                ? Theme.of(context).primaryColor
                : Colors.grey.withOpacity(0.3),
            width: 2,
          ),
        ),
        child: Column(
          children: [
            Icon(
              icon,
              size: 30,
              color: isSelected
                  ? Theme.of(context).primaryColor
                  : Colors.grey,
            ),
            SizedBox(height: 12),
            Text(
              title,
              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium?.copyWith(
                fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                color: isSelected
                    ? Theme.of(context).primaryColor
                    : null,
              ),
            ),
            SizedBox(height: 4),
            Text(
              description,
              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.bodySmall,
              textAlign: TextAlign.center,
            ),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
  
  String _formatDuration(int seconds) {
    final minutes = seconds ~/ 60;
    if (minutes < 60) {
      return '$minutes minutes';
    }
    final hours = minutes ~/ 60;
    final remainingMinutes = minutes % 60;
    return '$hours h ${remainingMinutes > 0 ? '$remainingMinutes min' : ''}';
  }
}

2.     Update Router for Session Setup:

o   Update lib/config/router.dart to add:

dart
GoRoute(
  path: '/meditation/setup/:trackId',
  builder: (context, state) => SessionSetupScreen(
    trackId: state.params['trackId']!,
  ),
),

Phase 14: Audio Service Implementation

1.     Create Audio Service:

o   Create lib/data/services/audio_service.dart

dart
import 'package:just_audio/just_audio.dart';
import 'package:audio_service/audio_service.dart';
 
class MeditationAudioService {
  static final MeditationAudioService _instance = MeditationAudioService._internal();
  late final AudioPlayer _audioPlayer;
  
  // Singleton pattern
  factory MeditationAudioService() {
    return _instance;
  }
  
  MeditationAudioService._internal() {
    _audioPlayer = AudioPlayer();
  }
  
  Future<void> initialize() async {
    // Initialize audio service
  }
  
  Future<void> loadAudio(String url) async {
    await _audioPlayer.setUrl(url);
  }
  
  Future<void> play() async {
    await _audioPlayer.play();
  }
  
  Future<void> pause() async {
    await _audioPlayer.pause();
  }
  
  Future<void> stop() async {
    await _audioPlayer.stop();
  }
  
  Future<void> seekTo(Duration position) async {
    await _audioPlayer.seek(position);
  }
  
  Future<void> dispose() async {
    await _audioPlayer.dispose();
  }
  
  // Stream getters
  Stream<PlayerState> get playerStateStream => _audioPlayer.playerStateStream;
  Stream<Duration?> get positionStream => _audioPlayer.positionStream;
  Stream<Duration?> get durationStream => _audioPlayer.durationStream;
  
  // Property getters
  bool get playing => _audioPlayer.playing;
  Duration? get duration => _audioPlayer.duration;
  Duration get position => _audioPlayer.position;
}

2.     Create Meditation Provider:

o   Create lib/presentation/state/meditation_provider.dart

dart
import 'dart:async';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:just_audio/just_audio.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/data/models/track_model.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/track_repository.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/data/services/audio_service.dart';
 
// Audio service provider
final audioServiceProvider = Provider<MeditationAudioService>((ref) {
  return MeditationAudioService();
});
 
// Current track provider
final currentTrackProvider = StateProvider<TrackModel?>((ref) => null);
 
// Is guided meditation provider
final isGuidedProvider = StateProvider<bool>((ref) => true);
 
// Player state provider
final playerStateProvider = StreamProvider<PlayerState>((ref) {
  final audioService = ref.watch(audioServiceProvider);
  return audioService.playerStateStream;
});
 
// Position stream provider
final positionStreamProvider = StreamProvider<Duration?>((ref) {
  final audioService = ref.watch(audioServiceProvider);
  return audioService.positionStream;
});
 
// Duration stream provider
final durationStreamProvider = StreamProvider<Duration?>((ref) {
  final audioService = ref.watch(audioServiceProvider);
  return audioService.durationStream;
});
 
// Meditation state provider
enum MeditationState { initial, loading, playing, paused, completed, error }
 
final meditationStateProvider = StateProvider<MeditationState>((ref) {
  return MeditationState.initial;
});
 
// Meditation service class that combines state management
class MeditationService {
  final Ref _ref;
  Timer? _sessionTimer;
  DateTime? _sessionStartTime;
  
  MeditationService(this._ref);
  
  Future<void> startMeditation(String trackId, bool isGuided) async {
    try {
      _ref.read(meditationStateProvider.notifier).state = MeditationState.loading;
      _ref.read(isGuidedProvider.notifier).state = isGuided;
      
      // Get track from repository
      final trackRepo = _ref.read(trackRepositoryProvider);
      final track = await trackRepo.getTrackById(trackId);
      
      if (track == null) {
        throw Exception('Track not found');
      }
      
      _ref.read(currentTrackProvider.notifier).state = track;
      
      // Load and play audio
      final audioService = _ref.read(audioServiceProvider);
      await audioService.loadAudio(track.audioUrl);
      await audioService.play();
      
      _sessionStartTime = DateTime.now();
      _ref.read(meditationStateProvider.notifier).state = MeditationState.playing;
      
      // Start a timer to complete the session when track ends
      _startSessionTimer(track.duration);
    } catch (e) {
      print('Error starting meditation: $e');
      _ref.read(meditationStateProvider.notifier).state = MeditationState.error;
    }
  }
  
  Future<void> pauseMeditation() async {
    try {
      final audioService = _ref.read(audioServiceProvider);
      await audioService.pause();
      _sessionTimer?.cancel();
      _ref.read(meditationStateProvider.notifier).state = MeditationState.paused;
    } catch (e) {
      print('Error pausing meditation: $e');
    }
  }
  
  Future<void> resumeMeditation() async {
    try {
      final audioService = _ref.read(audioServiceProvider);
      await audioService.play();
      
      // Recalculate remaining time
      final track = _ref.read(currentTrackProvider);
      if (track != null) {
        final elapsedSeconds = audioService.position.inSeconds;
        final remainingSeconds = track.duration - elapsedSeconds;
        if (remainingSeconds > 0) {
          _startSessionTimer(remainingSeconds);
        }
      }
      
      _ref.read(meditationStateProvider.notifier).state = MeditationState.playing;
    } catch (e) {
      print('Error resuming meditation: $e');
    }
  }
  
  Future<void> completeMeditation() async {
    try {
      final audioService = _ref.read(audioServiceProvider);
      await audioService.stop();
      _sessionTimer?.cancel();
      
      _ref.read(meditationStateProvider.notifier).state = MeditationState.completed;
      
      // Record session
      await _recordSession();
    } catch (e) {
      print('Error completing meditation: $e');
    }
  }
  
  Future<void> _recordSession() async {
    // TODO: Implement session recording to database
    print('Session completed and recorded');
  }
  
  void _startSessionTimer(int durationInSeconds) {
    _sessionTimer?.cancel();
    _sessionTimer = Timer(Duration(seconds: durationInSeconds), () {
      completeMeditation();
    });
  }
  
  void cleanup() {
    _sessionTimer?.cancel();
    _sessionStartTime = null;
    _ref.read(currentTrackProvider.notifier).state = null;
    _ref.read(meditationStateProvider.notifier).state = MeditationState.initial;
  }
}
 
// Meditation service provider
final meditationServiceProvider = Provider<MeditationService>((ref) {
  return MeditationService(ref);
});

 

Phase 15: Meditation Player Screen

1.     Create Meditation Player Screen:

o   Create lib/presentation/screens/meditation/meditation_player_screen.dart

dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_hooks/flutter_hooks.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import 'package:hooks_riverpod/hooks_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:just_audio/just_audio.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/meditation_provider.dart';
 
class MeditationPlayerScreen extends HookConsumerWidget {
  final String trackId;
  final bool isGuided;
  
  const MeditationPlayerScreen({
    Key? key,
    required this.trackId,
    required this.isGuided,
  }) : super(key: key);
 
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final meditationState = ref.watch(meditationStateProvider);
    final meditationService = ref.watch(meditationServiceProvider);
    final currentTrack = ref.watch(currentTrackProvider);
    final playerState = ref.watch(playerStateProvider);
    final position = ref.watch(positionStreamProvider);
    final duration = ref.watch(durationStreamProvider);
    
    // Initialize meditation on first build
    useEffect(() {
      meditationService.startMeditation(trackId, isGuided);
      
      // Cleanup when leaving the screen
      return () {
        meditationService.cleanup();
      };
    }, []);
    
    // Calculate progress
    final progress = useMemoized(() {
      if (position.value == null || duration.value == null) {
        return 0.0;
      }
      return position.value!.inMilliseconds / duration.value!.inMilliseconds;
    }, [position.value, duration.value]);
    
    // Format time function
    String formatTime(Duration duration) {
      String twoDigits(int n) => n.toString().padLeft(2, '0');
      final minutes = twoDigits(duration.inMinutes.remainder(60));
      final seconds = twoDigits(duration.inSeconds.remainder(60));
      return '$minutes:$seconds';
    }
    
    // Handle pause/resume
    void togglePlayPause() {
      if (meditationState == MeditationState.playing) {
        meditationService.pauseMeditation();
      } else if (meditationState == MeditationState.paused) {
        meditationService.resumeMeditation();
      }
    }
    
    // Handle completing meditation early
    void finishMeditation() {
      meditationService.completeMeditation();
      context.go('/meditation/complete');
    }
    
    // Handle back button
    Future<bool> _onWillPop() async {
      bool shouldPop = await showDialog(
        context: context,
        builder: (context) => AlertDialog(
          title: Text('End meditation?'),
          content: Text('Your progress will not be saved.'),
          actions: [
            TextButton(
              onPressed: () => Navigator.of(context).pop(false),
              child: Text('Cancel'),
            ),
            TextButton(
              onPressed: () => Navigator.of(context).pop(true),
              child: Text('End'),
            ),
          ],
        ),
      ) ?? false;
      
      if (shouldPop) {
        meditationService.cleanup();
      }
      
      return shouldPop;
    }
    
    return WillPopScope(
      onWillPop: _onWillPop,
      child: Scaffold(
        backgroundColor: Theme.of(context).colorScheme.primary.withOpacity(0.1),
        appBar: AppBar(
          title: Text('Meditating'),
          backgroundColor: Colors.transparent,
          elevation: 0,
          leading: IconButton(
            icon: Icon(Icons.close),
            onPressed: () => _onWillPop().then((shouldPop) {
              if (shouldPop) {
                context.pop();
              }
            }),
          ),
        ),
        body: SafeArea(
          child: Padding(
            padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24.0),
            child: Column(
              children: [
                // Track title
                Text(
                  currentTrack?.title ?? 'Loading...',
                  style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,
                  textAlign: TextAlign.center,
                ),
                SizedBox(height: 8),
                Text(
                  isGuided ? 'Guided Meditation' : 'Music Only',
                  style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,
                ),
                
                // Illustration/Animation
                Expanded(
                  child: Center(
                    child: Container(
                      width: 200,
                      height: 200,
                      decoration: BoxDecoration(
                        shape: BoxShape.circle,
                        color: Theme.of(context).primaryColor.withOpacity(0.2),
                      ),
                      child: Center(
                        child: Icon(
                          Icons.self_improvement,
                          size: 100,
                          color: Theme.of(context).primaryColor,
                        ),
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
                
                // Progress bar
                Padding(
                  padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 24.0),
                  child: Column(
                    children: [
                      LinearProgressIndicator(
                        value: progress,
                        minHeight: 10,
                        backgroundColor: Colors.grey.withOpacity(0.2),
                      ),
                      SizedBox(height: 8),
                      Row(
                        mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceBetween,
                        children: [
                          Text(
                            position.value != null
                                ? formatTime(position.value!)
                                : '00:00',
                          ),
                          Text(
                            duration.value != null
                                ? formatTime(duration.value!)
                                : '--:--',
                          ),
                        ],
                      ),
                    ],
                  ),
                ),
                
                // Control buttons
                Row(
                  mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
                  children: [
                    IconButton(
                      icon: Icon(Icons.stop),
                      iconSize: 40,
                      onPressed: finishMeditation,
                    ),
                    SizedBox(width: 24),
                    IconButton(
                      icon: Icon(
                        meditationState == MeditationState.playing
                            ? Icons.pause_circle_filled
                            : Icons.play_circle_filled,
                      ),
                      iconSize: 64,
                      color: Theme.of(context).primaryColor,
                      onPressed: playerState.when(
                        data: (state) => state.processingState != ProcessingState.completed
                            ? togglePlayPause
                            : null,
                        loading: () => null,
                        error: (_, __) => null,
                      ),
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
                SizedBox(height: 40),
              ],
            ),
          ),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

2.     Create Session Completion Screen:

o   Create lib/presentation/screens/meditation/session_completion_screen.dart

dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import 'package:hooks_riverpod/hooks_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/meditation_provider.dart';
import 'package:share_plus/share_plus.dart';
 
class SessionCompletionScreen extends ConsumerWidget {
  const SessionCompletionScreen({Key? key}) : super(key: key);
 
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final currentTrack = ref.watch(currentTrackProvider);
    
    void shareSession() {
      if (currentTrack != null) {
        Share.share(
          'I just completed a meditation session with "${currentTrack.title}" on Meditation App! 🧘‍♀️ #MeditationApp',
        );
      }
    }
    
    return Scaffold(
      body: SafeArea(
        child: Padding(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24.0),
          child: Column(
            mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
            children: [
              Container(
                width: 120,
                height: 120,
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  shape: BoxShape.circle,
                  color: Colors.green.withOpacity(0.2),
                ),
                child: Center(
                  child: Icon(
                    Icons.check_circle,
                    size: 80,
                    color: Colors.green,
                  ),
                ),
              ),
              SizedBox(height: 32),
              Text(
                'Session Complete',
                style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,
              ),
              SizedBox(height: 16),
              Text(
                currentTrack?.title ?? 'Meditation',
                style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleLarge,
              ),
              SizedBox(height: 8),
              Text(
                'Your meditation has been added to your calendar.',
                textAlign: TextAlign.center,
              ),
              SizedBox(height: 40),
              
              // Share button
              OutlinedButton.icon(
                icon: Icon(Icons.share),
                label: Text('Share Your Session'),
                onPressed: shareSession,
                style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(
                  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(
                    horizontal: 24,
                    vertical: 12,
                  ),
                ),
              ),
              SizedBox(height: 16),
              
              // View Calendar button
              ElevatedButton(
                onPressed: () {
                  context.go('/calendar');
                },
                child: Text('View Calendar'),
                style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(
                    horizontal: 24,
                    vertical: 12,
                  ),
                ),
              ),
              SizedBox(height: 16),
              
              // Return to Home button
              TextButton(
                onPressed: () {
                  context.go('/home');
                },
                child: Text('Return to Home'),
              ),
            ],
          ),
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

3.     Update Router for Meditation Screens:

o   Update lib/config/router.dart to add:

dart
GoRoute(
  path: '/meditation/player/:trackId',
  builder: (context, state) => MeditationPlayerScreen(
    trackId: state.params['trackId']!,
    isGuided: state.queryParams['guided'] != 'false',
  ),
),
GoRoute(
  path: '/meditation/complete',
  builder: (context, state) => SessionCompletionScreen(),
),
