  final user = ref.watch(currentUserProvider);

  if (user == null) return {};

 

  final sessionRepo = ref.watch(sessionRepositoryProvider);

  return await sessionRepo.getUserMeditationStats(user.id);

});

 

// Monthly meditation minutes for the current year

final monthlyMeditationMinutesProvider = FutureProvider<Map<String, int>>((ref) async {

  final user = ref.watch(currentUserProvider);

  if (user == null) return {};

 

  final sessionRepo = ref.watch(sessionRepositoryProvider);

  final currentYear = DateTime.now().year;

  return await sessionRepo.getMonthlyMeditationMinutes(user.id, currentYear);

});

 

// Time of day preferences

final timeOfDayStatsProvider = FutureProvider<Map<String, dynamic>>((ref) async {

  final user = ref.watch(currentUserProvider);

  if (user == null) return {};

 

  final sessionRepo = ref.watch(sessionRepositoryProvider);

  return await sessionRepo.getStrengthsByTimeOfDay(user.id);

});

 

// Last 7 days meditation minutes

final last7DaysMeditationProvider = FutureProvider<Map<DateTime, int>>((ref) async {

  final user = ref.watch(currentUserProvider);

  if (user == null) return {};

 

  final sessionRepo = ref.watch(sessionRepositoryProvider);

  final now = DateTime.now();

  final sevenDaysAgo = now.subtract(Duration(days: 7));

 

  return await sessionRepo.getSessionCalendarData(

    user.id,

    startDate: sevenDaysAgo,

    endDate: now,

  );

});

3. Create a Statistics Detail Screen:

·       Create lib/presentation/screens/statistics_detail_screen.dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:flutter_hooks/flutter_hooks.dart';

import 'package:hooks_riverpod/hooks_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:intl/intl.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/statistics_provider.dart';

import 'package:fl_chart/fl_chart.dart';

 

class StatisticsDetailScreen extends HookConsumerWidget {

  const StatisticsDetailScreen({Key? key}) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {

    final userStats = ref.watch(userMeditationStatsProvider);

    final monthlyStats = ref.watch(monthlyMeditationMinutesProvider);

    final timeOfDayStats = ref.watch(timeOfDayStatsProvider);

    final last7DayStats = ref.watch(last7DaysMeditationProvider);

   

    final selectedTab = useState(0);

   

    return Scaffold(

      appBar: AppBar(

        title: Text('Meditation Statistics'),

      ),

      body: Column(

        children: [

          // Tab selection

          Padding(

            padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

            child: SegmentedButton<int>(

              segments: [

                ButtonSegment(

                  value: 0,

                  label: Text('Summary'),

                  icon: Icon(Icons.summarize),

                ),

                ButtonSegment(

                  value: 1,

                  label: Text('Trends'),

                  icon: Icon(Icons.trending_up),

                ),

                ButtonSegment(

                  value: 2,

                  label: Text('Patterns'),

                  icon: Icon(Icons.access_time),

                ),

              ],

              selected: {selectedTab.value},

              onSelectionChanged: (Set<int> selection) {

                selectedTab.value = selection.first;

              },

            ),

          ),

         

          // Content based on selected tab

          Expanded(

            child: IndexedStack(

              index: selectedTab.value,

              children: [

                _buildSummaryTab(context, userStats),

                _buildTrendsTab(context, monthlyStats, last7DayStats),

                _buildPatternsTab(context, timeOfDayStats),

              ],

            ),

          ),

        ],

      ),

    );

  }

 

  Widget _buildSummaryTab(BuildContext context, AsyncValue<Map<String, dynamic>> userStats) {

    return SingleChildScrollView(

      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

      child: userStats.when(

        data: (stats) => Column(

          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

          children: [

            Text(

              'Meditation Journey',

              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineSmall,

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 24),

           

            // Main stats cards

            GridView.count(

              crossAxisCount: 2,

              shrinkWrap: true,

              physics: NeverScrollableScrollPhysics(),

              childAspectRatio: 1.5,

              mainAxisSpacing: 16,

              crossAxisSpacing: 16,

              children: [

                _buildStatCard(

                  context,

                  'Total Minutes',

                  '${stats['totalMinutes']}',

                  Icons.timer,

                  Colors.blue,

                ),

                _buildStatCard(

                  context,

                  'Total Sessions',

                  '${stats['totalSessions']}',

                  Icons.repeat,

                  Colors.purple,

                ),

                _buildStatCard(

                  context,

                  'Current Streak',

                  '${stats['currentStreak']} days',

                  Icons.local_fire_department,

                  Colors.orange,

                ),

                _buildStatCard(

                  context,

                  'Longest Streak',

                  '${stats['longestStreak']} days',

                  Icons.emoji_events,

                  Colors.amber,

                ),

              ],

            ),

           

            SizedBox(height: 24),

           

            // Additional stats

            Text(

              'Additional Insights',

              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 16),

           

            Card(

              child: Padding(

                padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

                child: Column(

                  crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

                  children: [

                    Row(

                      children: [

                        Icon(Icons.insights, color: Colors.teal),

                        SizedBox(width: 8),

                        Text(

                          'Your Average Session',

                          style: TextStyle(

                            fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

                            fontSize: 16,

                          ),

                        ),

                      ],

                    ),

                    SizedBox(height: 16),

                    Text(

                      '${stats['averageSessionLength'].toStringAsFixed(1)} minutes',

                      style: TextStyle(

                        fontSize: 24,

                        fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

                        color: Colors.teal,

                      ),

                    ),

                    SizedBox(height: 8),

                    Text(

                      stats['averageSessionLength'] < 10

                          ? 'Try to increase your session length for better results!'

                          : 'Great job maintaining consistent sessions!',

                      style: TextStyle(fontSize: 14),

                    ),

                  ],

                ),

              ),

            ),

           

            SizedBox(height: 16),

           

            // Last session info

            if (stats['lastSessionDate'] != null)

              Card(

                child: Padding(

                  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

                  child: Column(

                    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

                    children: [

                      Row(

                        children: [

                          Icon(Icons.calendar_today, color: Colors.indigo),

                          SizedBox(width: 8),

                          Text(

                            'Last Meditation',

                            style: TextStyle(

                              fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

                              fontSize: 16,

                            ),

                          ),

                        ],

                      ),

                      SizedBox(height: 16),

                      Text(

                        DateFormat('MMMM d, yyyy').format(stats['lastSessionDate']),

                        style: TextStyle(

                          fontSize: 18,

                          fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

                        ),

                      ),

                      SizedBox(height: 8),

                      Text(

                        _getLastSessionMessage(stats['lastSessionDate']),

                        style: TextStyle(fontSize: 14),

                      ),

                    ],

                  ),

                ),

              ),

          ],

        ),

        loading: () => Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),

        error: (error, stack) => Center(

          child: Text('Could not load meditation statistics'),

        ),

      ),

    );

  }

 

  Widget _buildTrendsTab(

    BuildContext context,

    AsyncValue<Map<String, int>> monthlyStats,

    AsyncValue<Map<DateTime, int>> last7DayStats,

  ) {

    return SingleChildScrollView(

      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

      child: Column(

        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

        children: [

          Text(

            'Monthly Activity',

            style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,

          ),

          SizedBox(height: 16),

         

          // Monthly chart

          Container(

            height: 200,

            child: monthlyStats.when(

              data: (data) => BarChart(

                BarChartData(

                  alignment: BarChartAlignment.spaceAround,

                  maxY: data.values.isEmpty ? 10 : (data.values.reduce((a, b) => a > b ? a : b) * 1.2),

                  titlesData: FlTitlesData(

                    leftTitles: AxisTitles(

                      sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: true, reservedSize: 30),

                    ),

                    bottomTitles: AxisTitles(

                      sideTitles: SideTitles(

                        showTitles: true,

                        getTitlesWidget: (value, meta) {

                          const months = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Aug', 'Sep', 'Oct', 'Nov', 'Dec'];

                          final index = value.toInt();

                          if (index >= 0 && index < months.length) {

                            return Text(months[index]);

                          }

                          return Text('');

                        },

                      ),

                    ),

                    rightTitles: AxisTitles(sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: false)),

                    topTitles: AxisTitles(sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: false)),

                  ),

                  borderData: FlBorderData(show: false),

                  barGroups: [

                    for (int i = 0; i < 12; i++)

                      BarChartGroupData(

                        x: i,

                        barRods: [

                          BarChartRodData(

                            toY: data[_getMonthKey(i + 1)] ?? 0,

                            color: Theme.of(context).primaryColor,

                            width: 16,

                            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4),

                          ),

                        ],

                      ),

                  ],

                ),

              ),

              loading: () => Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),

              error: (_, __) => Center(child: Text('Could not load monthly data')),

            ),

          ),

         

          SizedBox(height: 32),

         

          Text(

            'Last 7 Days',

            style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,

          ),

          SizedBox(height: 16),

         

          // Last 7 days chart

          Container(

            height: 200,

            child: last7DayStats.when(

              data: (data) {

                final sortedEntries = data.entries.toList()

                  ..sort((a, b) => a.key.compareTo(b.key));

               

                return LineChart(

                  LineChartData(

                    lineBarsData: [

                      LineChartBarData(

                        spots: [

                          for (int i = 0; i < sortedEntries.length; i++)

                            FlSpot(i.toDouble(), sortedEntries[i].value.toDouble()),

                        ],

                        isCurved: true,

                        color: Theme.of(context).primaryColor,

                        barWidth: 4,

                        isStrokeCapRound: true,

                        dotData: FlDotData(show: true),

                        belowBarData: BarAreaData(

                          show: true,

                          color: Theme.of(context).primaryColor.withOpacity(0.2),

                        ),

                      ),

                    ],

                    titlesData: FlTitlesData(

                      leftTitles: AxisTitles(

                        sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: true, reservedSize: 30),

                      ),

                      bottomTitles: AxisTitles(

                        sideTitles: SideTitles(

                          showTitles: true,

                          getTitlesWidget: (value, meta) {

                            final index = value.toInt();

                            if (index >= 0 && index < sortedEntries.length) {

                              return Padding(

                                padding: EdgeInsets.only(top: 8),

                                child: Text(

                                  DateFormat('E').format(sortedEntries[index].key),

                                  style: TextStyle(fontSize: 10),

                                ),

                              );

                            }

                            return Text('');

                          },

                        ),

                      ),

                      rightTitles: AxisTitles(sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: false)),

                      topTitles: AxisTitles(sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: false)),

                    ),

                    borderData: FlBorderData(show: false),

                    gridData: FlGridData(show: true, drawVerticalLine: false),

                  ),

                );

              },

              loading: () => Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),

              error: (_, __) => Center(child: Text('Could not load recent data')),

            ),

          ),

        ],

      ),

    );

  }

 

  Widget _buildPatternsTab(BuildContext context, AsyncValue<Map<String, dynamic>> timeOfDayStats) {

    return SingleChildScrollView(

      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

      child: Column(

        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

        children: [

          Text(

            'When You Meditate',

            style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,

          ),

          SizedBox(height: 16),

         

          timeOfDayStats.when(

            data: (data) {

              final percentages = data['percentages'] as Map<String, dynamic>;

              final minutes = data['minutes'] as Map<String, dynamic>;

             

              return Column(

                children: [

                  // Pie chart

                  Container(

                    height: 250,

                    child: PieChart(

                      PieChartData(

                        sections: [

                          PieChartSectionData(

                            value: percentages['morning'] * 100,

                            title: '${(percentages['morning'] * 100).toStringAsFixed(0)}%',

                            color: Colors.amber,

                            radius: 60,

                          ),

                          PieChartSectionData(

                            value: percentages['afternoon'] * 100,

                            title: '${(percentages['afternoon'] * 100).toStringAsFixed(0)}%',

                            color: Colors.blue,

                            radius: 60,

                          ),

                          PieChartSectionData(

                            value: percentages['evening'] * 100,

                            title: '${(percentages['evening'] * 100).toStringAsFixed(0)}%',

                            color: Colors.purple,

                            radius: 60,

                          ),

                          PieChartSectionData(

                            value: percentages['night'] * 100,

                            title: '${(percentages['night'] * 100).toStringAsFixed(0)}%',

                            color: Colors.indigo,

                            radius: 60,

                          ),

                        ],

                        sectionsSpace: 2,

                        centerSpaceRadius: 40,

                      ),

                    ),

                  ),

                 

                  SizedBox(height: 24),

                 

                  // Legend

                  Row(

                    mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceAround,

                    children: [

                      _buildLegendItem('Morning', Colors.amber, '${minutes['morning']} min'),

                      _buildLegendItem('Afternoon', Colors.blue, '${minutes['afternoon']} min'),

                    ],

                  ),

                  SizedBox(height: 16),

                  Row(

                    mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceAround,

                    children: [

                      _buildLegendItem('Evening', Colors.purple, '${minutes['evening']} min'),

                      _buildLegendItem('Night', Colors.indigo, '${minutes['night']} min'),

                    ],

                  ),

                 

                  SizedBox(height: 32),

                 

                  // Meditation times card

                  Card(

                    child: Padding(

                      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

                      child: Column(

                        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

                        children: [

                          Text(

                            'Your Meditation Pattern',

                            style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16),

                          ),

                          SizedBox(height: 16),

                          Text(

                            _getTimeOfDayInsight(percentages),

                            style: TextStyle(fontSize: 14),

                          ),

                        ],

                      ),

                    ),

                  ),

                ],

              );

            },

            loading: () => Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),

            error: (_, __) => Center(child: Text('Could not load time pattern data')),

          ),

        ],

      ),

    );

  }

 

  Widget _buildStatCard(

    BuildContext context,

    String title,

    String value,

    IconData icon,

    Color color,

  ) {

    return Card(

      child: Padding(

        padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

        child: Column(

          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,

          children: [

            Icon(icon, size: 40, color: color),

            SizedBox(height: 8),

            Text(

              value,

              style: TextStyle(

                fontSize: 20,

                fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

              ),

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 4),

            Text(title),

          ],

        ),

      ),

    );

  }

 

  Widget _buildLegendItem(String label, Color color, String value) {

    return Row(

      children: [

        Container(

          width: 16,

          height: 16,

          decoration: BoxDecoration(

            color: color,

            shape: BoxShape.circle,

          ),

        ),

        SizedBox(width: 8),

        Column(

          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

          children: [

            Text(label),

            Text(value, style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),

          ],

        ),

      ],

    );

  }

 

  String _getMonthKey(int month) {

    return month.toString().padLeft(2, '0');

  }

 

  String _getLastSessionMessage(DateTime lastSession) {

    final now = DateTime.now();

    final difference = now.difference(lastSession);

   

    if (difference.inDays == 0) {

      return 'Great job! You meditated today.';

    } else if (difference.inDays == 1) {

      return 'You meditated yesterday. Don\'t break your streak!';

    } else if (difference.inDays <= 7) {

      return 'It\'s been ${difference.inDays} days since your last session.';

    } else {

      return 'Time to restart your meditation practice!';

    }

  }

 

  String _getTimeOfDayInsight(Map<String, dynamic> percentages) {

    // Find the time of day with highest percentage

    String highestTimeOfDay = 'morning';

    double highestPercentage = percentages['morning'];

   

    for (final entry in percentages.entries) {

      if (entry.value > highestPercentage) {

        highestPercentage = entry.value;

        highestTimeOfDay = entry.key;

      }

    }

   

    // Generate insight based on preferred time

    switch (highestTimeOfDay) {

      case 'morning':

        return 'You prefer morning meditation! This is a great way to start your day with a calm and focused mind.';

      case 'afternoon':

        return 'Afternoon seems to be your preferred meditation time. This can be a great way to reset during the middle of your day.';

      case 'evening':

        return 'Evening meditation works best for you. This helps transition from your active day to a restful evening.';

      case 'night':

        return 'You mostly meditate at night. This can help prepare your mind for restful sleep.';

      default:

        return 'Your meditation pattern shows flexibility in different times of day.';

    }

  }

}

 

Continuing from where we left off with the Statistics Detail Screen:

dart

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:flutter_hooks/flutter_hooks.dart';

import 'package:hooks_riverpod/hooks_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:intl/intl.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/statistics_provider.dart';

import 'package:fl_chart/fl_chart.dart';

 

class StatisticsDetailScreen extends HookConsumerWidget {

  const StatisticsDetailScreen({Key? key}) : super(key: key);

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {

    final userStats = ref.watch(userMeditationStatsProvider);

    final monthlyStats = ref.watch(monthlyMeditationMinutesProvider);

    final timeOfDayStats = ref.watch(timeOfDayStatsProvider);

    final last7DayStats = ref.watch(last7DaysMeditationProvider);

   

    final selectedTab = useState(0);

   

    return Scaffold(

      appBar: AppBar(

        title: Text('Meditation Statistics'),

      ),

      body: Column(

        children: [

          // Tab selection

          Padding(

            padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

            child: SegmentedButton<int>(

              segments: [

                ButtonSegment(

                  value: 0,

                  label: Text('Summary'),

                  icon: Icon(Icons.summarize),

                ),

                ButtonSegment(

                  value: 1,

                  label: Text('Trends'),

                  icon: Icon(Icons.trending_up),

                ),

                ButtonSegment(

                  value: 2,

                  label: Text('Patterns'),

                  icon: Icon(Icons.access_time),

                ),

              ],

              selected: {selectedTab.value},

              onSelectionChanged: (Set<int> selection) {

                selectedTab.value = selection.first;

              },

            ),

          ),

         

          // Content based on selected tab

          Expanded(

            child: IndexedStack(

              index: selectedTab.value,

              children: [

                _buildSummaryTab(context, userStats),

                _buildTrendsTab(context, monthlyStats, last7DayStats),

                _buildPatternsTab(context, timeOfDayStats),

              ],

            ),

          ),

        ],

      ),

    );

  }

 

  Widget _buildSummaryTab(BuildContext context, AsyncValue<Map<String, dynamic>> userStats) {

    return SingleChildScrollView(

      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

      child: userStats.when(

        data: (stats) => Column(

          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

          children: [

            Text(

              'Meditation Journey',

              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineSmall,

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 24),

           

            // Main stats cards

            GridView.count(

              crossAxisCount: 2,

              shrinkWrap: true,

              physics: NeverScrollableScrollPhysics(),

              childAspectRatio: 1.5,

              mainAxisSpacing: 16,

              crossAxisSpacing: 16,

              children: [

                _buildStatCard(

                  context,

                  'Total Minutes',

                  '${stats['totalMinutes']}',

                  Icons.timer,

                  Colors.blue,

                ),

                _buildStatCard(

                  context,

                  'Total Sessions',

                  '${stats['totalSessions']}',

                  Icons.repeat,

                  Colors.purple,

                ),

                _buildStatCard(

                  context,

                  'Current Streak',

                  '${stats['currentStreak']} days',

                  Icons.local_fire_department,

                  Colors.orange,

                ),

                _buildStatCard(

                  context,

                  'Longest Streak',

                  '${stats['longestStreak']} days',

                  Icons.emoji_events,

                  Colors.amber,

                ),

              ],

            ),

           

            SizedBox(height: 24),

           

            // Additional stats

            Text(

              'Additional Insights',

              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 16),

           

            Card(

              child: Padding(

                padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

                child: Column(

                  crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

                  children: [

                    Row(

                      children: [

                        Icon(Icons.insights, color: Colors.teal),

                        SizedBox(width: 8),

                        Text(

                          'Your Average Session',

                          style: TextStyle(

                            fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

                            fontSize: 16,

                          ),

                        ),

                      ],

                    ),

                    SizedBox(height: 16),

                    Text(

                      '${stats['averageSessionLength'].toStringAsFixed(1)} minutes',

                      style: TextStyle(

                        fontSize: 24,

                        fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

                        color: Colors.teal,

                      ),

                    ),

                    SizedBox(height: 8),

                    Text(

                      stats['averageSessionLength'] < 10

                          ? 'Try to increase your session length for better results!'

                          : 'Great job maintaining consistent sessions!',

                      style: TextStyle(fontSize: 14),

                    ),

                  ],

                ),

              ),

            ),

           

            SizedBox(height: 16),

           

            // Last session info

            if (stats['lastSessionDate'] != null)

              Card(

                child: Padding(

                  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

                  child: Column(

                    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

                    children: [

                      Row(

                        children: [

                          Icon(Icons.calendar_today, color: Colors.indigo),

                          SizedBox(width: 8),

                          Text(

                            'Last Meditation',

                            style: TextStyle(

                              fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

                              fontSize: 16,

                            ),

                          ),

                        ],

                      ),

                      SizedBox(height: 16),

                      Text(

                        DateFormat('MMMM d, yyyy').format(stats['lastSessionDate']),

                        style: TextStyle(

                          fontSize: 18,

                          fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

                        ),

                      ),

                      SizedBox(height: 8),

                      Text(

                        _getLastSessionMessage(stats['lastSessionDate']),

                        style: TextStyle(fontSize: 14),

                      ),

                    ],

                  ),

                ),

              ),

          ],

        ),

        loading: () => Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),

        error: (error, stack) => Center(

          child: Text('Could not load meditation statistics'),

        ),

      ),

    );

  }

 

  Widget _buildTrendsTab(

    BuildContext context,

    AsyncValue<Map<String, int>> monthlyStats,

    AsyncValue<Map<DateTime, int>> last7DayStats,

  ) {

    return SingleChildScrollView(

      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

      child: Column(

        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

        children: [

          Text(

            'Monthly Activity',

            style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,

          ),

          SizedBox(height: 16),

         

          // Monthly chart

          Container(

            height: 200,

            child: monthlyStats.when(

              data: (data) => BarChart(

                BarChartData(

                  alignment: BarChartAlignment.spaceAround,

                  maxY: data.values.isEmpty ? 10 : (data.values.reduce((a, b) => a > b ? a : b) * 1.2),

                  titlesData: FlTitlesData(

                    leftTitles: AxisTitles(

                      sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: true, reservedSize: 30),

                    ),

                    bottomTitles: AxisTitles(

                      sideTitles: SideTitles(

                        showTitles: true,

                        getTitlesWidget: (value, meta) {

                          const months = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Aug', 'Sep', 'Oct', 'Nov', 'Dec'];

                          final index = value.toInt();

                          if (index >= 0 && index < months.length) {

                            return Text(months[index]);

                          }

                          return Text('');

                        },

                      ),

                    ),

                    rightTitles: AxisTitles(sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: false)),

                    topTitles: AxisTitles(sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: false)),

                  ),

                  borderData: FlBorderData(show: false),

                  barGroups: [

                    for (int i = 0; i < 12; i++)

                      BarChartGroupData(

                        x: i,

                        barRods: [

                          BarChartRodData(

                            toY: data[_getMonthKey(i + 1)] ?? 0,

                            color: Theme.of(context).primaryColor,

                            width: 16,

                            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4),

                          ),

                        ],

                      ),

                  ],

                ),

              ),

              loading: () => Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),

              error: (_, __) => Center(child: Text('Could not load monthly data')),

            ),

          ),

         

          SizedBox(height: 32),

         

          Text(

            'Last 7 Days',

            style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,

          ),

          SizedBox(height: 16),

         

          // Last 7 days chart

          Container(

            height: 200,

            child: last7DayStats.when(

              data: (data) {

                final sortedEntries = data.entries.toList()

                  ..sort((a, b) => a.key.compareTo(b.key));

               

                return LineChart(

                  LineChartData(

                    lineBarsData: [

                      LineChartBarData(

                        spots: [

                          for (int i = 0; i < sortedEntries.length; i++)

                            FlSpot(i.toDouble(), sortedEntries[i].value.toDouble()),

                        ],

                        isCurved: true,

                        color: Theme.of(context).primaryColor,

                        barWidth: 4,

                        isStrokeCapRound: true,

                        dotData: FlDotData(show: true),

                        belowBarData: BarAreaData(

                          show: true,

                          color: Theme.of(context).primaryColor.withOpacity(0.2),

                        ),

                      ),

                    ],

                    titlesData: FlTitlesData(

                      leftTitles: AxisTitles(

                        sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: true, reservedSize: 30),

                      ),

                      bottomTitles: AxisTitles(

                        sideTitles: SideTitles(

                          showTitles: true,

                          getTitlesWidget: (value, meta) {

                            final index = value.toInt();

                            if (index >= 0 && index < sortedEntries.length) {

                              return Padding(

                                padding: EdgeInsets.only(top: 8),

                                child: Text(

                                  DateFormat('E').format(sortedEntries[index].key),

                                  style: TextStyle(fontSize: 10),

                                ),

                              );

                            }

                            return Text('');

                          },

                        ),

                      ),

                      rightTitles: AxisTitles(sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: false)),

                      topTitles: AxisTitles(sideTitles: SideTitles(showTitles: false)),

                    ),

                    borderData: FlBorderData(show: false),

                    gridData: FlGridData(show: true, drawVerticalLine: false),

                  ),

                );

              },

              loading: () => Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),

              error: (_, __) => Center(child: Text('Could not load recent data')),

            ),

          ),

        ],

      ),

    );

  }

 

  Widget _buildPatternsTab(BuildContext context, AsyncValue<Map<String, dynamic>> timeOfDayStats) {

    return SingleChildScrollView(

      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

      child: Column(

        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

        children: [

          Text(

            'When You Meditate',

            style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium,

          ),

          SizedBox(height: 16),

         

          timeOfDayStats.when(

            data: (data) {

              final percentages = data['percentages'] as Map<String, dynamic>;

              final minutes = data['minutes'] as Map<String, dynamic>;

             

              return Column(

                children: [

                  // Pie chart

                  Container(

                    height: 250,

                    child: PieChart(

                      PieChartData(

                        sections: [

                          PieChartSectionData(

                            value: percentages['morning'] * 100,

                            title: '${(percentages['morning'] * 100).toStringAsFixed(0)}%',

                            color: Colors.amber,

                            radius: 60,

                          ),

                          PieChartSectionData(

                            value: percentages['afternoon'] * 100,

                            title: '${(percentages['afternoon'] * 100).toStringAsFixed(0)}%',

                            color: Colors.blue,

                            radius: 60,

                          ),

                          PieChartSectionData(

                            value: percentages['evening'] * 100,

                            title: '${(percentages['evening'] * 100).toStringAsFixed(0)}%',

                            color: Colors.purple,

                            radius: 60,

                          ),

                          PieChartSectionData(

                            value: percentages['night'] * 100,

                            title: '${(percentages['night'] * 100).toStringAsFixed(0)}%',

                            color: Colors.indigo,

                            radius: 60,

                          ),

                        ],

                        sectionsSpace: 2,

                        centerSpaceRadius: 40,

                      ),

                    ),

                  ),

                 

                  SizedBox(height: 24),

                 

                  // Legend

                  Row(

                    mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceAround,

                    children: [

                      _buildLegendItem('Morning', Colors.amber, '${minutes['morning']} min'),

                      _buildLegendItem('Afternoon', Colors.blue, '${minutes['afternoon']} min'),

                    ],

                  ),

                  SizedBox(height: 16),

                  Row(

                    mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceAround,

                    children: [

                      _buildLegendItem('Evening', Colors.purple, '${minutes['evening']} min'),

                      _buildLegendItem('Night', Colors.indigo, '${minutes['night']} min'),

                    ],

                  ),

                 

                  SizedBox(height: 32),

                 

                  // Meditation times card

                  Card(

                    child: Padding(

                      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

                      child: Column(

                        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

                        children: [

                          Text(

                            'Your Meditation Pattern',

                            style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold, fontSize: 16),

                          ),

                          SizedBox(height: 16),

                          Text(

                            _getTimeOfDayInsight(percentages),

                            style: TextStyle(fontSize: 14),

                          ),

                        ],

                      ),

                    ),

                  ),

                ],

              );

            },

            loading: () => Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator()),

            error: (_, __) => Center(child: Text('Could not load time pattern data')),

          ),

        ],

      ),

    );

  }

 

  Widget _buildStatCard(

    BuildContext context,

    String title,

    String value,

    IconData icon,

    Color color,

  ) {

    return Card(

      child: Padding(

        padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),

        child: Column(

          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,

          children: [

            Icon(icon, size: 40, color: color),

            SizedBox(height: 8),

            Text(

              value,

              style: TextStyle(

                fontSize: 20,

                fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,

              ),

            ),

            SizedBox(height: 4),

            Text(title),

          ],

        ),

      ),

    );

  }

 

  Widget _buildLegendItem(String label, Color color, String value) {

    return Row(

      children: [

        Container(

          width: 16,

          height: 16,

          decoration: BoxDecoration(

            color: color,

            shape: BoxShape.circle,

          ),

        ),

        SizedBox(width: 8),

        Column(

          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,

          children: [

            Text(label),

            Text(value, style: TextStyle(fontWeight: FontWeight.bold)),

          ],

        ),

      ],

    );

  }

 

  String _getMonthKey(int month) {

    return month.toString().padLeft(2, '0');

  }

 

  String _getLastSessionMessage(DateTime lastSession) {

    final now = DateTime.now();

    final difference = now.difference(lastSession);

   

    if (difference.inDays == 0) {

      return 'Great job! You meditated today.';

    } else if (difference.inDays == 1) {

      return 'You meditated yesterday. Don\'t break your streak!';

    } else if (difference.inDays <= 7) {

      return 'It\'s been ${difference.inDays} days since your last session.';

    } else {

      return 'Time to restart your meditation practice!';

    }

  }

 

  String _getTimeOfDayInsight(Map<String, dynamic> percentages) {

    // Find the time of day with highest percentage

    String highestTimeOfDay = 'morning';

    double highestPercentage = percentages['morning'];

   

    for (final entry in percentages.entries) {

      if (entry.value > highestPercentage) {

        highestPercentage = entry.value;

        highestTimeOfDay = entry.key;

      }

    }

   

    // Generate insight based on preferred time

    switch (highestTimeOfDay) {

      case 'morning':

        return 'You prefer morning meditation! This is a great way to start your day with a calm and focused mind.';

      case 'afternoon':

        return 'Afternoon seems to be your preferred meditation time. This can be a great way to reset during the middle of your day.';

      case 'evening':

        return 'Evening meditation works best for you. This helps transition from your active day to a restful evening.';

      case 'night':

        return 'You mostly meditate at night. This can help prepare your mind for restful sleep.';

      default:

        return 'Your meditation pattern shows flexibility in different times of day.';

    }

  }

}

  1. Add Statistics Screen to Calendar Screen:
    • Update lib/presentation/screens/calendar_screen.dart to add a button for detailed statistics

dart

// Add this to the Calendar Screen's AppBar

actions: [

  IconButton(

    icon: Icon(Icons.share),

    onPressed: showShareSheet,

  ),

  IconButton(

    icon: Icon(Icons.bar_chart),

    onPressed: () {

      context.push('/statistics');

    },

    tooltip: 'Detailed Statistics',

  ),

],

  1. Update Router for Statistics Screen:
    • Update lib/config/router.dart to add:

dart

GoRoute(

  path: '/statistics',

  builder: (context, state) => StatisticsDetailScreen(),

),

  1. Add fl_chart Package:
    • Run command to add the chart package:

bash

flutter pub add fl_chart

Phase 22: Deep Link Handler for Referrals

  1. Create Deep Link Handler:
    • Create lib/utils/deep_link_handler.dart

dart

import 'dart:async';

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

import 'package:flutter/services.dart';

import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/artist_referral_repository.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/data/repositories/referral_repository.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/artist_provider.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/auth_provider.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/artist_referral_provider.dart';

import 'package:meditation_app/presentation/state/referral_provider.dart';

import 'package:uni_links/uni_links.dart';

 

class DeepLinkHandler {

  final ProviderRef ref;

  StreamSubscription? _linkSubscription;

 

  DeepLinkHandler(this.ref);

 

  Future<void> initUniLinks() async {

    // Handle initial link if app was opened from a link

    try {

      final initialLink = await getInitialLink();

      if (initialLink != null) {

        _handleLink(initialLink);

      }

    } on PlatformException {

      // Error getting initial link

      print('Error getting initial deep link');

    }

 

    // Handle links when app is already running

    _linkSubscription = linkStream.listen((String? link) {

      if (link != null) {

        _handleLink(link);

      }

    }, onError: (error) {

      print('Error handling deep link: $error');

    });

  }

 

  void dispose() {

    _linkSubscription?.cancel();

  }

 

  void _handleLink(String link) async {

    final uri = Uri.parse(link);

   

    // Handle artist referral links

    if (uri.path.contains('/artist') && uri.queryParameters.containsKey('code')) {

      final code = uri.queryParameters['code'];

      await _handleArtistReferral(code);

    }

   

    // Handle user referral links

    else if (uri.path.contains('/refer') && uri.queryParameters.containsKey('code')) {

      final code = uri.queryParameters['code'];

      await _handleUserReferral(code);

    }

  }

 

  Future<void> _handleArtistReferral(String? code) async {

    if (code == null) return;

   

    // Store the code for use during signup

    ref.read(_pendingArtistReferralProvider.notifier).state = code;

   

    // If user is already logged in, show artist profile

    if (ref.read(isAuthenticatedProvider)) {

      // Try to find the artist

      final artistRepo = ref.read(artistRepositoryProvider);

      final artist = await artistRepo.getArtistByReferralCode(code);

     

      if (artist != null) {

        // Navigate to artist detail page

        // This would typically be handled by a router, but we're storing

        // the artist ID for use by the router

        ref.read(_pendingArtistIdToShowProvider.notifier).state = artist.id;

      }

    }

  }

 

  Future<void> _handleUserReferral(String? code) async {

    if (code == null) return;

   

    // Store the code for use during signup

    ref.read(_pendingUserReferralProvider.notifier).state = code;

  }

}

 

// Providers for storing pending referral information

final _pendingArtistReferralProvider = StateProvider<String?>((ref) => null);

final _pendingUserReferralProvider = StateProvider<String?>((ref) => null);

final _pendingArtistIdToShowProvider = StateProvider<String?>((ref) => null);

 

// Provider to access the deep link handler

final deepLinkHandlerProvider = Provider<DeepLinkHandler>((ref) {

  final handler = DeepLinkHandler(ref);

  handler.initUniLinks();

  return handler;

});

 

// Provider to get pending artist ID to show (if set by deep link)

final pendingArtistIdProvider = Provider<String?>((ref) {

  return ref.watch(_pendingArtistIdToShowProvider);

});

 

// Provider to get pending artist referral code (if set by deep link)

final pendingArtistReferralProvider = Provider<String?>((ref) {

  return ref.watch(_pendingArtistReferralProvider);

});

 

// Provider to get pending user referral code (if set by deep link)

final pendingUserReferralProvider = Provider<String?>((ref) {

  return ref.watch(_pendingUserReferralProvider);

});

  1. Initialize Deep Link Handler in Main:
    • Update lib/main.dart to initialize deep link handling:

dart

// In main.dart, add this to the ProviderScope overrides

ProviderScope(

  overrides: [

    // Initialize deep link handler

    deepLinkHandlerProvider,

  ],

  child: MeditationApp(),

),

  1. Update Router to Handle Deep Links:
    • Update lib/config/router.dart to handle deep links:

dart

// Add this to your GoRouter configuration

GoRouter(

  initialLocation: '/',

  urlPathStrategy: UrlPathStrategy.path,

  redirectLimit: 5,

  redirect: (state) {

    // Check if we need to redirect based on deep link

    final pendingArtistId = ref.read(pendingArtistIdProvider);

   

    if (pendingArtistId != null) {

      // Clear the pending artist ID

      ref.read(_pendingArtistIdToShowProvider.notifier).state = null;

      // Redirect to artist page

      return '/artists/$pendingArtistId';

    }

   

    // Handle authentication redirects

    final isAuthenticated = ref.read(isAuthenticatedProvider);

   

    if (!isAuthenticated && !state.location.startsWith('/auth')) {

      // Preserve any referral codes in the query parameters

      final pendingArtistCode = ref.read(pendingArtistReferralProvider);

      final pendingUserCode = ref.read(pendingUserReferralProvider);

     

      String redirectPath = '/auth/login';

     

      if (pendingArtistCode != null) {

        redirectPath += '?artistCode=$pendingArtistCode';

      } else if (pendingUserCode != null) {

        redirectPath += '?userCode=$pendingUserCode';

      }

     

      return redirectPath;

    }

   

    if (isAuthenticated && state.location.startsWith('/auth')) {

      return '/home';

    }

   

    return null;

  },

  // Rest of the router configuration

),

  1. Add uni_links Package:
    • Run command to add the deep linking package:

bash

flutter pub add uni_links

  1. Configure Platform-Specific Deep Link Settings:
    • For Android, update android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:

xml

<intent-filter>

    <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" />

    <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />

    <category android:name="android.intent.category.BROWSABLE" />

    <data android:scheme="meditationapp" android:host="artist" />

    <data android:scheme="meditationapp" android:host="refer" />

</intent-filter>

  • For iOS, update ios/Runner/Info.plist:

xml

<key>CFBundleURLTypes</key>

<array>

    <dict>

        <key>CFBundleTypeRole</key>

        <string>Editor</string>

        <key>CFBundleURLName</key>

        <string>com.yourcompany.meditationapp</string>

        <key>CFBundleURLSchemes</key>

        <array>

            <string>meditationapp</string>

        </array>

    </dict>

</array>

 

 

Phase 23: Final Touches and Testing

1.     Add App Icon and Splash Screen:

o   Install the flutter_launcher_icons package:

bash
flutter pub add flutter_launcher_icons

o   Create assets/icon/app_icon.png with your app icon (1024x1024px recommended)

o   Add to pubspec.yaml:

yaml
flutter_icons:
  android: "launcher_icon"
  ios: true
  image_path: "assets/icon/app_icon.png"
  min_sdk_android: 21

o   Run: flutter pub run flutter_launcher_icons

2.     Update Assets Configuration:

o   Update pubspec.yaml to include assets:

yaml
flutter:
  assets:
    - assets/icon/
    - .env

3.     Handle Deep Links for Artist Referrals:

o   Update android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml to add:

xml
<intent-filter>
  <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" />
  <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
  <category android:name="android.intent.category.BROWSABLE" />
  <data android:scheme="meditationapp" android:host="artist" />
</intent-filter>

o   Update ios/Runner/Info.plist to add:

xml
<key>CFBundleURLTypes</key>
<array>
  <dict>
    <key>CFBundleTypeRole</key>
    <string>Editor</string>
    <key>CFBundleURLName</key>
    <string>com.yourcompany.meditationapp</string>
    <key>CFBundleURLSchemes</key>
    <array>
      <string>meditationapp</string>
    </array>
  </dict>
</array>

o   Update router to handle deep links:

dart
// Add to GoRouter configuration
initialLocation: '/',
urlPathStrategy: UrlPathStrategy.path,
redirectLimit: 5,
redirect: (state) {
  // Handle artist referral links
  final referralUri = Uri.tryParse(state.location);
  if (referralUri != null && 
      referralUri.pathSegments.isNotEmpty && 
      referralUri.pathSegments.first == 'artist') {
    final referralCode = referralUri.pathSegments.last;
    return '/auth/signup?referralCode=$referralCode';
  }
  return null;
},

4.     Comprehensive Testing:

o   Test on Multiple Devices:

§  Run on iOS simulator and Android emulator

§  Test on at least one physical device for each platform

§  Verify UI renders correctly on different screen sizes

o   Test Authentication:

§  Signup with email/password

§  Login with email/password

§  Logout

§  Password reset flow

§  Referral link signup

o   Test Meditation Features:

§  Artist browsing and search

§  Meditation session start, pause, resume, completion

§  Audio plays correctly in background

§  Session tracking and stats update correctly

o   Test Calendar:

§  Calendar visualization displays correctly

§  Session data renders with correct colors

§  Detail view shows session information

§  Stats are computed correctly

5.     Performance Optimization:

o   Run Flutter Performance Analysis:

§  In VS Code, open DevTools

§  Check frame rate during common operations

§  Identify any performance bottlenecks

o   Memory Usage:

§  Monitor for memory leaks during extended use

§  Ensure images and audio are properly cached/released

o   Startup Time:

§  Measure app startup time

§  Consider adding a preloaded splash screen for slower devices

6.     Error Handling:

o   Add Global Error Handler: 

dart
// In main.dart
void main() async {
  WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized();
  
  // Catch Flutter errors
  FlutterError.onError = (FlutterErrorDetails details) {
    print('Flutter Error: ${details.exception}');
    // Log to analytics or crash reporting service
  };
  
  // Catch Dart errors
  runZonedGuarded(() async {
    await dotenv.load();
    await SupabaseService().initialize();
    runApp(ProviderScope(child: MeditationApp()));
  }, (error, stackTrace) {
    print('Dart Error: $error');
    // Log to analytics or crash reporting service
  });
}

o   Add Error Boundaries:

§  Create fallback UI components for error states

§  Ensure each section of the app fails gracefully

Phase 24: Deployment Preparation

1.     Android Deployment Preparation:

o   Update App Details in android/app/build.gradle: 

gradle
android {
  defaultConfig {
    applicationId "com.yourcompany.meditationapp"
    minSdkVersion 21
    targetSdkVersion 33
    versionCode 1
    versionName "1.0.0"
  }
}

o   Create a Keystore for Signing: 

bash
keytool -genkey -v -keystore ~/upload-keystore.jks -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -alias upload

o   Configure Signing in android/app/build.gradle

o   Create a Release Build: 

bash
flutter build appbundle

o   Test Release Build on a Real Device

o   Prepare Play Store Listing:

§  Screenshots (various device sizes)

§  Promotional graphics

§  App description

§  Privacy policy URL

2.     iOS Deployment Preparation:

o   Update App Details in Xcode:

§  Open ios/Runner.xcworkspace

§  Set Bundle Identifier

§  Set Version and Build

§  Configure Signing

o   Build Release IPA: 

bash
flutter build ios

o   Use Xcode to Archive for App Store Connect

o   Prepare App Store Listing:

§  Screenshots

§  App description

§  Privacy policy URL

§  Keywords

§  App Store description

3.     Create Privacy Policy and Terms of Service:

o   Draft a privacy policy covering:

§  Data collection practices

§  How meditation data is used

§  Third-party services

§  User rights

o   Host Privacy Policy:

§  Create a simple GitHub Pages site

§  Or host on your company website

4.     Implement Analytics:

o   Add Firebase Analytics: 

bash
flutter pub add firebase_core firebase_analytics

o   Initialize Firebase: 

dart
await Firebase.initializeApp(
  options: DefaultFirebaseOptions.currentPlatform,
);

o   Track Key Events: 

dart
FirebaseAnalytics analytics = FirebaseAnalytics.instance;
 
// Track meditation completion
await analytics.logEvent(
  name: 'meditation_completed',
  parameters: {
    'duration': session.duration,
    'artist_id': track.artistId,
    'track_id': track.id,
  },
);

5.     Final Pre-Launch Checklist:

o   All user flows complete and tested

o   Authentication works reliably

o   Artist profile system functional

o   Meditation player works consistently (esp. background audio)

o   Calendar visualization displays correctly

o   App description, screenshots, and assets ready for stores

o   Privacy policy and terms published

o   Analytics properly tracking key metrics

o   Production database set up and secured

o   Error reporting configured

o   Performance acceptable on target devices

Post-Launch Considerations

1.     Monitor Analytics:

o   User acquisition and retention

o   Session completion rates

o   Popular artists and tracks

o   Conversion rates for premium features

2.     Gather User Feedback:

o   Create a simple feedback mechanism in the app

o   Monitor app store reviews

o   Collect user suggestions for improvement

3.     Prepare for Updates:

o   Prioritize bugs and issues

o   Plan feature enhancements based on user data

o   Prepare for regular content updates with new artists

4.     Artist Relationship Management:

o   Create artist dashboard for performance metrics

o   Build process for artist payouts

o   Develop strategy for onboarding new artists

5.     Marketing and Growth:

o   Leverage artist-sharing model for organic growth

o   Consider cross-promotion with artists' other products

o   Create promotional content showcasing the calendar visualization

o   Implement strategies to reactivate lapsed users
